title: Moonshot AI 发布 Kimi K3：首个开源 2.8 万亿参数 MoE 模型
summary: 月之暗面（Moonshot AI）于 7 月 16 日正式发布 Kimi K3，这是一个 2.8 万亿参数的混合专家（MoE）模型，采用 Kimi Delta Attention 和 Attention Residuals 架构，原生支持视觉能力。模型拥有 100 万 token 上下文窗口，在 Terminal Bench 2.1 上得分 88.3、FrontierSWE 上 81.2、GPQA-Diamond 上 93.5、MathVision 上 94.3，相比 K2 实现约 2.5 倍的缩放效率提升。完整开源权重计划于 7 月 27 日前释放。发布后 48 小时内需求激增导致 GPU 接近容量上限，Moonshot 于 7 月 19 日宣布暂停新用户订阅。彭博社报道 Moonshot 年化经常性收入已达 3 亿美元，正准备在香港上市。

title: arXiv 本周十大 AI ML 论文：因果推理、多模态实体对齐、RAG 成本治理等
summary: ArXiv TLDR 整理了 2026 年 7 月 13-19 日一周内最受关注的十大 AI/ML 论文：1) CausalDS——评估 LLM 代理因果推理能力的新基准；2) QANTA 2026 多模态 QA 代理；3) 程序流程图辅助代码生成；4) Cost-Governed RAG——多租户 LLM 系统的成本归因架构；5) PROBE——评估 LLM 代码生成的新基准。

title: Anthropic × Blackstone 推出 Ode：15 亿美元 AI 实施服务公司
summary: Anthropic 与 Blackstone 联合推出 Ode，一家价值 15 亿美元的 AI 实施服务公司，旨在帮助企业部署和使用 AI 模型。这标志着 AI 模型厂商开始向下游实施服务延伸，构建更完整的 AI 价值链。

title: Thinking Machines Inkling：Mira Murati 发布 975B 参数 MoE 开源模型
summary: OpenAI 前 CTO Mira Murati 创办的 Thinking Machines 发布了 Inkling，一个 975B 参数的混合专家（MoE）开源模型。该模型在多项基准测试中表现优异，被视为挑战 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 主导地位的重要力量。

title: xAI Grok Build 被曝默认上传完整 Git 仓库及敏感密钥
raw_summary: 安全研究员 cereblab 发现 xAI 的 AI 编程助手 Grok Build CLI 版本 0.2.93 在后台以"流量分析"名义，静默地将整个本地 Git 仓库（含 .git 目录、未跟踪文件、完整提交历史、.env 密钥文件）上传至 xAI 的 GCS 存储桶 grok-code-session-traces。事件于 7 月 14 日登上 Hacker News 首页后，Elon Musk 承诺删除所有已上传的用户数据。7 月 17 日 xAI 将 Grok Build 开源以回应安全质疑。

title: WAIC 2026 闭幕：具身智能成最大亮点，四足/人形机器人集体亮相
raw_summary: 为期四天的 2026 世界人工智能大会（WAIC）于 7 月 20 日在上海闭幕。本届大会吸引 1100+ 企业参展、3000+ AI 产品展出、1400+ 国际嘉宾。具身智能（Embodied AI）成为最大焦点——AGIBOT 发布四款机器人（A3 Ultra 人形、X2 Edu 教育、G2 Max 工业、OmniHand 3 Ultra-M 机械手），JAKA 展示全栈具身智能方案，后摩智能携 M50 Inside 终端推动端侧 AI 落地。大会期间还展示了能做饭、打乒乓球的社交机器人。

title: Nubia 发布 NaviX Ultra：号称全球首款 AI Agent 智能手机
raw_summary: ZTE 旗下品牌 Nubia 在 WAIC 2026 上发布 NaviX Ultra，宣称是全球首款 AI Agent 智能手机。该设备搭载本地 AI 代理能力，可在手机端直接运行智能体任务，无需依赖云端。与此同时，StepFun 和 Honor 也在 WAIC 上展示了各自的 AI 原生手机方案。IDC 预计 AI 智能手机将占中国市场份额过半。

title: 微软培训销售团队以更激进方式竞争 OpenAI 和 Anthropic
raw_summary: 据 TechCrunch 7 月 16 日报道，微软正在培训其企业销售团队，以更积极的方式推销其自有 AI 模型（MAI），而非仅仅推广 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 的产品。微软要求销售人员将 AI 定位为端到端解决方案，强调效率和成本优势。此举反映了微软在 AI 领域的战略转变——虽然持有 OpenAI 大量股份且在其 Copilot 中集成 Anthropic 模型，但正试图建立自有模型的商业竞争力。

title: 图灵奖得主 Richard Sutton 创办 Oak Lab，抨击当前 AI 方法 fundamentally broken
raw_summary: 2024 年图灵奖共同获得者、强化学习之父 Richard Sutton 于 7 月 15 日宣布离开 John Carmack 的 Keen Technologies，在多伦多创办 Oak Lab。Sutton 认为当前深度学习方法是弱且低效的，主张构建能从运行环境中持续学习的 AI 代理。Oak Lab 的目标是打造仅需 20 瓦功耗就能运行的 AI 代理，采用其提出的 OaK 架构。

title: Apple 起诉 OpenAI 窃取硬件商业秘密
raw_summary: Apple 于 7 月 10 日在加州北区联邦法院起诉 OpenAI，指控其 orchestrated 一场窃取 iPhone 制造商硬件商业秘密的阴谋。起诉涉及 400 多名前 Apple 员工，指控 OpenAI 窃取了屏幕外扬声器等硬件设计。Apple 寻求禁令阻止 OpenAI 使用其商业秘密。

title: Meta 与 Anthropic 洽谈百亿美元 AI 算力租赁协议
summary: 据纽约时报和多家媒体 7 月 19 日报道，Meta 与 Anthropic 正在早期谈判一项可能价值高达 100 亿美元的算力租赁协议，为期两年。该交易凸显 AI 开发所需算力的高度稀缺性。Meta 计划在 2026 年投入高达 1450 亿美元用于 AI 基础设施，其首个 AI 数据中心超级集群 Prometheus 将于 2026 年上线。Meta 还计划从 9 月开始量产自研 AI 芯片。

title: 智谱 AI 发布触高两年 AGI 计划，目标 150 亿美元投入
raw_summary: 智谱 AI 创始人唐杰于 7 月 12 日发布触高两年研究计划，目标是通过四大支柱实现 AGI：长程任务执行、自主代理系统、全自动自训练模型和安全治理。该计划宣布投入 150 亿美元用于 AGI 研究。智谱的 GLM-5.2 模型已于 7 月 8 日发布。

title: 智谱 GLM-5.2 发布：7440 亿参数 MoE 模型以 MIT 许可证开源
raw_summary: 智谱 AI 于 7 月 8 日发布 GLM-5.2，一个 7440 亿参数的混合专家模型，每 token 激活 400 亿参数，以 MIT 许可证开源。该模型在 IDOR 漏洞检测方面超越 Claude，成本仅为前线的六分之一。GLM-5.2 原生支持 100 万 token 上下文窗口，被视为全球第一梯队的开源编码模型。

title: Meta 发布 Muse Spark 1.1 并首次推出付费 API，标志开源战略转向
raw_summary: Meta 于 7 月 9 日发布 Muse Spark 1.1，一个专注于编程和代理工作流的 multimodal 模型，同时推出首个付费 API。这标志着 Meta 结束了以 Llama 系列为核心的开源优先策略，首次对其 AI 模型收费。

title: xAI 发布 Grok 4.5：基于 V9 架构的 Opus 级模型
raw_summary: SpaceX xAI 于 7 月 8 日发布 Grok 4.5，Elon Musk 称之为 Opus 级 AI 模型。Grok 4.5 基于 xAI 新推出的 1.5 万亿参数 V9 基础模型构建，主打更快性能和更低 token 成本（$2/百万 token）。该模型已集成到 Cursor 和 Grok Build 中。

title: Mistral 发布 Robostral Navigate：单目 RGB 视觉机器人导航模型
raw_summary: 法国 AI 公司 Mistral 于 7 月 8 日发布 Robostral Navigate，一个 80 亿参数的具身导航模型。该模型仅使用单个 RGB 摄像头和自然语言指令就能引导机器人在陌生环境中导航，在 R2R-CE unseen 基准上达到 76.6% 的准确率。

title: OpenAI 关闭浏览器项目 Atlas，重心转向持久代理
raw_summary: 据 TechCrunch 7 月 9 日报道，OpenAI 正在关闭其浏览器项目 Atlas，但该组织的 AI 浏览器战略并未终止。与此同时，OpenAI 正在推进 ChatGPT Work 等持久代理产品，将重心从浏览器转向更长的任务执行。

title: Anthropic广告翻车：墓地意象引发广泛批评
raw_summary: Anthropic在7月中旬发布了一则名为There's Hope in Hard Questions的广告，使用燃烧房屋、监控和墓地等令人不安的意象来可视化vibe coding概念。广告引发广泛嘲笑和批评，OpenAI CEO Sam Altman甚至表示他认为这是讽刺。这是2026年最大的AI营销失误之一。Anthropic随后撤下了该广告。

title: 阶跃星辰发布全球首款AI智能体手机STEPX Neo
raw_summary: 7月13日，中国AI独角兽阶跃星辰（StepFun）在上海发布全球首款大模型原生智能体手机STEPX Neo。该设备搭载自研Step AOS智能体原生操作系统和内置AI Agent Amoo，可在离线状态下执行多步骤跨应用任务，支持预订行程、翻译32种语言等功能，无需打开具体APP。StepFun还与支付宝、美团、百度等10余家主流平台集成。该发布比OpenAI的硬件计划领先数年。

title: 阶跃星辰发布Step Edge端侧模型全家桶
raw_summary: 7月12日，阶跃星辰正式推出Step Edge端侧模型全家桶，面向手机、汽车等终端场景优化。包含四大模型：Step Edge基础模型、Step Edge Audio、Step Edge GUI和Step Edge Gen，主打超低延迟（响应速度可达0.1秒）、全模态隐私保护和原生端云协同。敏感数据可在本地处理，无需上传云端。该系列在29项核心评测指标中领先，标志着中国AI公司在端侧模型部署上的重要突破。

title: 苹果起诉OpenAI：指控ChatGPT窃取硬件开发商业秘密
raw_summary: 7月10日前后，苹果公司正式起诉OpenAI，指控后者雇佣数百名前苹果员工，利用其商业秘密加速AI硬件产品开发。苹果声称OpenAI在ChatGPT硬件方向上的布局直接侵犯了苹果的技术机密。与此同时，据报道OpenAI正计划推出首款硬件产品——一款无屏幕的智能音箱，被视为与苹果HomePod竞争。这一诉讼反映了AI巨头与传统科技巨头之间日益激烈的硬件竞赛。

title: Google DeepMind 推迟 Gemini 3.5 Pro 发布，编码性能不达标
summary: Google DeepMind 官方确认将 Gemini 3.5 Pro 的发布日期推迟，并取消了原始的基础模型版本，转而进行更深层次的预训练周期。据 9to5Google 报道，Google 在 6 月底更新了训练数据以提升编码能力，但结果令人失望，导致进一步延期。Gemini 3.5 Pro 将拥有 200 万 token 上下文窗口，通过 Google Cloud AI 平台和 API 端点提供。

title: ICML 2026杰出论文揭晓：扩散模型横扫顶级奖项
raw_summary: 7月5-7日，ICML 2026在韩国首尔COEX会展中心公布杰出论文奖。两篇扩散模型论文同时登顶，分别来自清华大学黄高团队和DeepMind经典工作。其中清华团队的论文对扩散语言模型提出了新的理论框架。会议期间还公布了最佳论文奖和最佳学生论文奖，涵盖了多模态推理、鲁棒性评估、量子神经网络等前沿方向。

title: GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra一小时证明50年图论猜想
raw_summary: 7月10日，OpenAI宣布GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra模式在不到一小时内证明了Cycle Double Cover（循环双重覆盖）猜想——一个自1970年代起悬而未决的图论难题。该模型同时运行多达64个子智能体进行并行推理，输出了3页的证明文档。虽然证明尚未经过同行评审和形式化验证，但这一成果展示了AI在高级数学推理方面的突破性能力。这是AI辅助数学证明领域的又一里程碑。

title: Meta发布Muse Spark 1.1：首个付费模型引爆AI价格战
raw_summary: 7月9日，Meta通过其Superintelligence Labs发布Muse Spark 1.1，这是Meta首个付费AI模型。该模型定位为coding和agentic AI领域的最强模型，在Vibe Code Bench v1.1上得分72.2，比Meta前代旗舰高出50分以上。定价极具侵略性：输入1.25美元/百万token，输出4.25美元/百万token，比Fable 5便宜10倍，比GLM-5.2 API还低。Meta AI负责人Alexandr Wang称其为非常有侵略性和吸引力的定价，直接触发AI行业新一轮价格战。

title: OpenAI发布GPT-5.6：三档模型+自主训练子模型突破
raw_summary: 7月9日，OpenAI正式发布GPT-5.6模型家族，包含Sol、Terra、Luna三个档次。GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra在发布次日即证明了50年图论猜想。更引人注目的是，GPT-5.6 Sol在自主训练模式下独立完成了对其小型模型Luna的后训练过程——从选择GPU到配置训练参数全部自主完成，在递归自我改进（RSI）基准测试中比GPT-5.5高出16.2分。同时ChatGPT引入了广告测试功能。

title: xAI发布Grok 4.5：基于V9芯片的编码先锋模型
raw_summary: 7月8日，xAI（SpaceX旗下）正式发布Grok 4.5，基于全新的1.5万亿参数V9架构。该模型专注于编码、智能体任务和知识工作，已在Grok Build和Cursor中上线。Grok 4.5在6月底曾于SpaceX和Tesla内部进行私有测试。该模型暂不在欧盟地区开放。Grok 4.5的发布与OpenAI GPT-5.6和Meta Muse Spark 1.1在72小时内密集推出，压缩了前沿AI的定价空间超过60%。

title: 腾讯混元Hy3正式发布：295B MoE模型开源并登顶OpenRouter
raw_summary: 7月6日，腾讯混元团队正式发布Hunyuan Hy3大模型。该模型采用MoE架构，总参数295B，激活参数仅21B，支持256K上下文窗口，并以Apache 2.0协议开源。发布首周调用量增长超68倍，登顶OpenRouter周调用榜。腾讯还同期开源了1bit和4bit量化版本，可实现单卡85GB内存部署。此外，腾讯还发布了HunyuanOCR-1.5（仅1B参数的轻量化OCR模型）和Hunyuan Image 3.0（800亿参数图生图模型）。

title: OpenAI 发布 GPT-Red：自动化红队 LLM 将提示注入攻击成功率从 90% 降至 23%
summary: OpenAI 在 MIT Technology Review 上披露了其内部自动化红队 LLM GPT-Red 的技术细节。该工具用于对抗性训练 GPT-5.6，使其抵御提示注入攻击。结果显示，在 GPT-5 上成功率超过 90% 的攻击在 GPT-5.6 上降至不到 23%。GPT-Red 的攻击成功率为 84%，远超人类红队测试员的 13%。GPT-Red 发现了一类之前未知的虚假思维链注入方式。

summary: 据 CNBC 7 月 17 日报道，特朗普政府现在直接控制哪些合作伙伴可以获得 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 的前沿 AI 模型访问权限。Anthropic 的 Project Glasswing 和 OpenAI 的 Daybreak 合作伙伴名单在添加新客户前都需要获得政府明确批准。政府曾在 6 月因国家安全问题封锁了 Claude Mythos 5 和 Fable 5。

title: 日本投资 60 亿美元部署 27500 块英伟达 Rubin GPU 构建主权 AI 机器人基础设施
summary: 由软银、索尼、本田、NEC 和丰田旗下 Preferred Networks 领导的约 44 家公司联盟——新成立的 Noetra Corp——将部署 27500 块英伟达 Rubin GPU 和 13750 块 Vera CPU（382 个 NVL72 机架，140MW），作为日本经济产业省 FRONTia 项目的主计算层，目标是打造面向实体 AI 和机器人的主权多模态基础模型。

title: 华为 Atlas 950 SuperPoD 在 WAIC 发布声称算力为英伟达 NVL144 的 6.7 倍
summary: 在上海世界人工智能大会 WAIC 7 月 16 日的开幕式上，华为公开展示了其 Atlas 950 SuperPoD 超算集群，基础配置将 1024 个昇腾芯片链接在一起，可扩展至 8192 个 NPU。该集群提供 1 EFLOPS FP8 和 2 EFLOPS FP4 算力，配备 256TB 统一内存，分布在 160 个机柜中。华为声称其算力和内存分别达到英伟达 NVL144 的 6.7 倍和 15 倍。

title: 29 国在上海签署协议成立世界人工智能合作组织 WAICO
summary: 7 月 16 日，29 个国家在上海签署协议，成立世界人工智能合作组织 WAICO，这是一个独立的政府间机构，总部设在上海。创始签署国包括俄罗斯、白俄罗斯、塞尔维亚、古巴、巴西、委内瑞拉、巴基斯坦、哈萨克斯坦、印度尼西亚和老挝。习近平在 WAIC 演讲中承诺五年内为发展中国家提供 5000 个 AI 培训机会。

title: Hugging Face 披露 AI 自主代理驱动的内部数据管道入侵事件
summary: Hugging Face 披露了一起自主 AI 代理入侵事件：恶意数据集利用了两个代码执行路径——远程代码数据集加载器和数据集配置中的模板注入——在处理 worker 上执行代码，随后提升到节点访问权限并横向移动以窃取云和集群凭据。HF 使用开源 GLM 5.2 对超过 17000 个攻击事件进行了法医分析。

title: Unabyss for Claude：MCP 原生的跨应用共享记忆层
summary: Unabyss 是一个 MCP 原生的自更新上下文层，解决 AI 助手跨应用记忆缺失的核心痛点。它将用户的 Notion、Slack、Gmail、GitHub、LinkedIn 等 20+ 日常应用中的数据自动提取、结构化并存储为持久化上下文库。该产品于 2026 年 5 月 25 日在 Product Hunt 发布，获得 659 票登顶日榜第一。
source: Product Hunt / GitHub PH AI Digest

title: ZooData：AI 代理的数据层——Web 到 JSON 与商业智能
raw_summary: ZooData 于 7 月 18 日在 Product Hunt 发布并获"日榜之星"，定位为 AI 代理的数据层。它提供 Web 到 JSON 的结构化数据提取和商业智能功能，解决了 AI 代理在实际工作中缺乏可靠数据源的核心痛点。

title: Thinking Machines Inkling：Mira Murati 首款开源多模态模型
raw_summary: OpenAI 前 CTO Mira Murati 创办的 Thinking Machines Lab 于 7 月 15 日发布其首款基础模型 Inkling，以开放权重形式提供给开发者微调。Inkling 具有多模态能力、高效推理和 Tinker 平台上的微调可用性。

title: Meta Muse Image：AI 图像生成整合 consent workflow
raw_summary: Meta 于 7 月 7 日宣布 Muse Image，一个基于 Muse Spark 基础的 AI 图像生成模型。Muse Image 支持图像编辑、多参考图像合成和迭代细化，并集成了创作者同意工作流程，确保名人形象不会被滥用。

title: Robostral Navigate：Mistral 首款机器人导航产品
raw_summary: Mistral 于 7 月 8 日发布 Robostral Navigate，这是一款面向机器人开发者的导航模型产品。它允许开发者将自然语言指令和单目视觉输入接入其机器人系统，实现无需 LiDAR 的自主导航。

title: LiveDemo - Open Source Interactive Product Demos
raw_summary: LiveDemo是一个开源的产品演示替代方案，对标Storylane、Navattic和Arcade。在Product Hunt获得311票。它帮助SaaS团队将产品展示转化为可点击的互动演示，解决获客转化瓶颈。

title: AgentGrid - Unified Canvas for AI Agents
raw_summary: AgentGrid将AI代理、终端和笔记整合到一个无限画布工作空间中，为用户提供统一的代理管理界面。在Product Hunt获得66票。

title: DocuSmart AI - Organizational Knowledge Consolidation
raw_summary: DocuSmart AI将分散的组织知识整合为一个统一的、可搜索的系统。在Product Hunt获得124票，解决了企业知识管理的痛点。

title: Mirage - SaaS Product to Clickable Demo in 90 Seconds
raw_summary: Mirage可将任何SaaS产品转化为可点击的演示，仅需90秒，面向营销和销售团队。在Product Hunt获得224票。

title: BaseRT：Apple Silicon 原生 Metal 推理运行时
summary: BaseRT 是由 BaseCompute 团队开发的面向 Apple Silicon（M4/M5）的原生 Metal 推理运行时，专为大规模语言模型优化。据官方博客声称，BaseRT 比 llama.cpp 快约 6.4 倍、比 MLX 快约 3.9 倍。该项目同时发布了学术论文（arXiv: 2607.00501）。

title: OpenMarkdown - Collaborative Markdown Editor for Human and AI
raw_summary: OpenMarkdown是一个专为人类与AI代理协作编辑设计的Markdown编辑器。在Product Hunt获得196票。

title: Kimi K3 - World's First Open 3T-Class AI Model
raw_summary: Kimi K3是全球首个开放的3万亿参数级AI模型，由月之暗面(Moonshot AI)于7月16日发布。该产品面向开发者和研究人员，在Product Hunt获得436票，排名当月AI产品第24位。Kimi K3支持100万token上下文窗口，在编码、知识和视觉推理方面具有强大能力，标志着开源前沿模型正在快速缩小与闭源系统的差距。

title: Unabyss for Claude - Shared Memory Across Apps and LLMs
raw_summary: Unabyss for Claude为Claude提供跨应用的共享记忆功能，使AI能在不同应用间保持上下文连续性。在Product Hunt获得589票，是7月AI产品中排名第10的高票产品。

title: WizeMe.APP - Private AI Memory Layer
raw_summary: WizeMe.APP是一个私人的AI记忆层，旨在支持更清晰的个人决策和执行力。代表AI记忆成为核心竞争层的趋势。

title: Aye - Teachable AI Intern for Browser Tasks
raw_summary: Aye是一个可教学的AI实习生，能在不离开浏览器工作流的情况下处理日常网页任务。在Product Hunt上发布。

title: isvisible.ai - AI Visibility Audit Tool
raw_summary: isvisible.ai是一个免费的AI可见性审计工具，帮助营销人员了解AI搜索引擎如何看待他们的品牌。在Product Hunt上发布。

title: Tilores Studio - Local-First Desktop Entity Resolution
raw_summary: Tilores Studio在本地桌面运行实体解析，无需云端依赖或注册。代表了对本地优先和数据主权基础设施的明确推动。

title: River - Autonomous AI Account Executives
raw_summary: River是自主AI销售代表，能够自动演示和关闭B2B交易。代表AI代理从辅助工具向完全替代人工职能的演进。

title: Verse - Build and Hire Autonomous AI Employees
raw_summary: Verse允许用户通过单个提示构建和雇佣自主AI员工。是7月17日AI代理集群中的核心产品之一。

title: Traceforce (YC S26) - MCP Security Monitoring Platform
raw_summary: Traceforce提供公司范围的AI应用安全监控（覆盖ChatGPT和Claude等设备），具有MCP数据源连接可视化和开源MCP渗透测试工具。代表了MCP协议作为安全基础设施平台化的趋势。

title: Claude Sonnet 5：Anthropic 最具代理能力的模型
summary: Anthropic 于 2026 年 6 月 30 日发布 Claude Sonnet 5，定位为 Sonnet 系列中最具代理能力的模型。该模型能够自主规划、使用浏览器和终端等工具，并以此前仅更大更昂贵模型才能达到的水平进行自主执行。Sonnet 5 在代码编写、推理和多步代理任务方面显著强于前代。

title: Graft AI - Living Map of Company Operations
raw_summary: Graft AI将公司运营转化为可导航和操作的活地图，使AI代理能够理解和执行业务流程。

title: Cito - Hybrid Academic Search for AI Agents
raw_summary: Cito是一个混合学术搜索引擎，覆盖2.36亿篇论文，专为AI代理使用而设计。在Product Hunt上发布。

title: Manta AI - Autonomous Web App Testing Agent
raw_summary: Manta AI是一个用于自主Web应用测试的AI代理，可减少手动QA工作量。代表AI代理在开发基础设施领域的应用扩展。

title: Gemini Notebook - Google's Renamed Research Tool
raw_summary: Google于7月16日正式将NotebookLM更名为Gemini Notebook，使其成为更大AI家族的一部分。产品地址不变(notes.google.com)，但仍保留原有功能。新增代码执行能力和与Gemini应用的深度同步，强化了其研究工具定位。这是Google持续的品牌整合策略的又一例证。

title: Roblox Build - AI-Powered Game Creation Feature
raw_summary: Roblox于7月16日宣布推出AI游戏创建功能'Build'，允许用户通过移动设备上的简单文本提示设计游戏，无需编程经验。该功能将免费基础版和付费选项同时推出。Roblox还在开发AI代理来辅助创作者进行游戏测试和分析。计划于7月28日开始测试。

title: DevSwat IDE - Next-Gen AI-Powered Development Environment
raw_summary: DevSwat IDE是基于VS Code的下一代AI集成开发环境，由DevSwat Intelligence驱动。整合了124个本地工具、聊天窗口会话、终端内执行和AST/依赖分析，帮助开发者更快运行和测试代码。7月16日在Product Hunt上线。

title: ByteDance UniVR-34B-Planning - New AI Model Release
raw_summary: 字节跳动发布UniVR-34B-Planning模型，是7月13日追踪到的最新AI模型发布之一。AI Flash Report显示2026年7月已有54个模型在过去90天内发布，平均每4天就有一个新模型问世。

title: Postfleet - Prompt-Injection-Safe Email for AI Agents
raw_summary: Postfleet是为AI代理设计的防提示注入邮件基础设施，使代理能够安全地发送和接收消息。解决了AI代理运营中的第二个层次问题——代理通信安全。

title: AnySearch - AI Search Infrastructure Tool
raw_summary: AnySearch于7月13日登上Product Hunt周榜第一名，成为过去一年中首个打破AI代理和基础模型发布主导地位的搜索类产品。这标志着搜索基础设施类AI工具重新获得市场关注。

title: WAICO - World Artificial Intelligence Cooperation Organization
raw_summary: 世界人工智能合作组织(WAICO)于2026年7月16日在上海成立。这是一个专注于人工智能的国际组织，总部设在上海。该组织的成立标志着全球AI治理和国际合作进入新阶段。

title: LM Studio Bionic：专为开源模型设计的 AI 代理应用
summary: LM Studio 于 2026 年 7 月 16 日发布 Bionic，一款专为开源模型设计的独立 AI 代理应用。Bionic 专注于实际工作任务：提供 Code 项目（仓库级内联 diff、代理搜索）和 Work 项目（文档、PDF、幻灯片、电子表格处理）两种模式。默认本地运行，代码不会离开用户机器。

title: ChatGPT Work：持久代理工作流
summary: OpenAI 在 2026 年 7 月推出了 ChatGPT Work，这是一个能够在项目中持续运行数小时的 AI 代理。与传统聊天界面不同，ChatGPT Work 可以长时间跟踪项目进度、自动维持上下文连续性，并在数小时内自主完成复杂的多步骤任务。

title: Neko Health 完成 7 亿美元 C 轮融资，估值 70 亿美元

title: Anthropic 与 Blackstone 联合推出 Ode：15 亿美元 AI 实施服务公司
raw_summary: Anthropic、Blackstone 和 Hellman & Friedman 于 7 月 15 日正式推出 Ode with Anthropic，一家价值 15 亿美元的 AI 实施服务公司。投资方联盟包括 Goldman Sachs、General Atlantic、Sequoia Capital 等。Ode 基于 Fractional 公司打造，旨在帮助大型企业规模化部署 AI。

title: DeepSeek 拟融资 15 亿美元筹备 IPO，年化收入近 5 亿美元
raw_summary: 据 Bloomberg 7 月 14 日报道，DeepSeek 正在准备 IPO 申请，可能于今年提交。公司正洽谈约 15 亿美元融资，估值达 710 亿美元。DeepSeek 年化经常性收入（ARR）已接近 5 亿美元。此前在 2026 年 6 月完成 74 亿人民币（约 10 亿美元）首轮外部融资。

title: 澳大利亚 AI 搜索初创 Marqo 完成 1250 万美元 A 轮融资
raw_summary: 澳大利亚 AI 搜索初创公司 Marqo 于 7 月中旬完成 1250 万美元 A 轮融资，由 Lightspeed Venture Partners 领投。Marqo 致力于帮助企业搜索非结构化数据，创始人曾来自 Amazon Duo 团队。公司计划将总部迁至加州旧金山。

title: 空间 AI 初创 Augmodo 融资 2100 万美元扩展计算机视觉业务
raw_summary: 空间 AI 初创公司 Augmodo 于 7 月 13 日宣布完成 2100 万美元融资，用于增强计算机视觉和机器学习能力。Augmodo 专注于零售店的 AI 空间分析，将扩展 Beyond 零售领域处理更多行业的大规模数据。

title: Anthropic 和 OpenAI 秘密提交 IPO 申请，2026 年 AI 上市潮来临

title: arXiv综述论文：递归自我改进AI的分类学——从有界自我完善到自主研究循环
raw_summary: arXiv论文2607.07663系统性地分类了1250篇关于AI自我改进的研究论文，将AI自我改进分为两个主要类别：有界自我完善（bounded self-refinement）——收敛性、可评估的，已成为工业实践；以及开放式递归自我改进（RSI）——仍处于受限于 grounding 要求、坍缩动力学和算力约束的阶段。该综述为理解当前AI自我改进技术的成熟度提供了系统性框架。

title: LLM-as-a-Coach: Experiential Learning for Non-Verifiable Tasks
raw_summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) on open-ended tasks compresses an LLM's rubric-based evaluation into a scalar reward, discarding rich textual feedback and conflating responses with distinct quality profiles. We propose Experiential Learning (EL), which repurposes the feedback model from an LLM-as-a-Judge into an LLM-as-a-Coach. The coach distills its assessment of each on-policy response into transferable experiential knowledge, which conditions a teacher model and is internalized by the policy through on-policy context distillation. Compared with scalar rewards, this higher-bandwidth feedback channel provides dense supervision and preserves fine-grained preferences among high-quality responses. Across two policy families, with feedback from the policy itself or a proprietary model, EL consistently outperforms rubric-based RL on held-out and unseen open-ended tasks. Notably, EL generalizes better beyond the training distribution, and mitigates reward hacking. These findings establish experiential knowledge as a richer and more generalizable learning signal for post-training on non-verifiable tasks.
summary: 开放任务的强化学习将LLM的基于量表的评估压缩为标量奖励，丢弃丰富的文本反馈并混淆不同质量特征的响应。本文提出体验式学习(EL)，将从LLM-as-a-Judge的反馈模型重新利用为LLM-as-a-Coach。教练将其对每个策略响应的评估提炼为可转移的体验知识， conditioning教师模型并通过策略上下文蒸馏内化。相比标量奖励，这种高带宽反馈通道提供密集监督并保留高质量响应间的细粒度偏好。在两种策略家族上（使用策略自身或专有模型的反馈），EL在保留和未见开放任务上一致超越基于量表的RL。值得注意的是EL在训练分布外泛化更好并减轻奖励黑客。结果确立体验知识为开放任务后训练中更丰富、更可泛化的学习信号。

title: How Does Alignment Tuning Shape Representations of Sycophancy and Related Cue-Induced Biases in LLMs?
raw_summary: Modern LLMs are alarmingly susceptible to surprisingly simple immaterial changes of input prompts: a casual hint, an incorrectly labeled few-shot example, or a fake prior assistant turn often flips an originally correct answer. We study where this susceptibility, spanning sycophancy and related cue-induced biases, lives inside the model. Across five model families and seven BCT bias types, we extract a per-bias direction from hidden states and triangulate it through three measures: probing, leave-one-dataset-out transfer, and causal intervention. The susceptibility is largely installed by alignment tuning rather than pretraining: pretrained base models barely cave to these biases, and their activations carry no cue-specific signal beyond question content. Within aligned models, each bias becomes a single coherent direction that we can both decode and steer along, recovering the unbiased answer across every family we test. The biases stay representationally distinct, however: cross-bias entanglement is model-specific rather than a property of the bias category, and even behaviorally similar biases occupy different directions. The same intervention also serves as a modest debiasing tool, recovering a meaningful share of bias-induced errors while preserving most correct answers across all instruct families. Cue-induced bias is therefore best understood not as a single flaw in LLMs but as a family of distinct, causally active directions that alignment tuning installs.
summary: 现代LLM对输入prompt的微妙变化极度敏感——一个随意提示、错误标记的few-shot示例或虚假的先前的助手回复都可能翻转原本正确的答案。本文研究这种易感性（包括谄媚和相关线索诱导偏差）存在于模型内部的何处。在五款模型家族和七种BCT偏差类型上，从隐藏状态提取每偏差方向，通过探测、留一数据集外转移和因果干预三种措施进行三角验证。研究发现：这种易感性主要由对齐微调安装而非预训练——预训练基础模型几乎不受这些偏差影响，其激活仅携带问题内容信号。在对齐模型中，每种偏差成为一个单一连贯方向，既可解码也可操控。偏差在表征上保持独立——跨偏差纠缠是模型特异性的。同一干预也作为适度的去偏工具，在保留大多数正确答案的同时恢复有意义的偏差诱导错误份额。线索诱导偏差最好理解为对齐微调安装的一系列独立、因果活跃的方向。

title: O-VAD: Industrial Video Anomaly Detection through Object-Centric Tracking and Reasoning
raw_summary: Industrial Video Anomaly Detection (IVAD) aims to identify anomalous objects and events in an industrial process, which is crucial for modern manufacturing and quality control systems. Existing VLM-based anomaly reasoning methods are capable of detecting open-ended anomalies in general domains. However, their performance declines in industrial settings characterized by intricate object transformations, strict physics, and procedural constraints. To tackle the complexity of such interaction-intensive detection, we introduce a training-free agentic framework for anomaly detection free of domain-specific knowledge, emphasizing object state evolution like humans inspectors. It is designed to track spatial-temporal dynamics and underlying transformations of detected objects over time, and then reason over the object-wise temporal state trajectories to identify abnormal objects in grounded frames. Our method overcomes limitations of prior approaches that rely on retraining on normal clips or injecting domain knowledge as context for test-time inference. Extensive experiments on three IVAD datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms frontier VLMs, agentic frameworks, and traditional VAD methods fine-tuned on the respective datasets, while providing interpretable reports over anomaly processes and types.
summary: 工业视频异常检测(IVAD)旨在识别工业流程中的异常对象和事件。现有基于VLM的异常推理方法能在通用领域检测开放异常，但在具有复杂对象变换、严格物理和程序约束的工业环境中性能下降。本文引入一种无需训练的代理框架，强调像人类检查员一样追踪对象状态演变。该框架设计用于追踪检测对象随时间的时空动力学和底层变换，然后在对象级时间状态轨迹上进行推理以识别异常。克服了依赖正常剪辑重训练或在测试时注入领域知识的先前方法局限。在三个IVAD数据集上的实验表明，该方法超越前沿VLM、代理框架和分别在各自数据集上微调的传统VAD方法，并提供异常过程和类型的可解释报告。

title: Do Language Models Dream of Binding Molecules? Benchmarking LLMs under Spatial Constraints
raw_summary: Structure-based drug design (SBDD) leverages the 3D structure of protein targets, often complemented by other spatial constraints, to generate candidate binding molecules. While diffusion models have dominated as a leading paradigm for high-quality 3D molecule generation, LLM-based methods are rapidly emerging in molecular design and have shown competitive performance in pocket-conditioned molecular generation. However, their ability to reason about physics and 3D spatial environments is largely underexplored. In this work, we systematically analyze whether current general-purpose LLMs are capable of navigating complex 3D constraints compared to established baselines such as specialized diffusion models. We consider 3D ligand generation conditioned on protein pockets together with ligand- and interaction-derived spatial constraints, including anchor fragments, pharmacophore points, and mandatory pocket-ligand interactions. To enable this evaluation, we introduce 3D-Fit - a token-efficient benchmarking strategy for assessing LLM performance on multi-conditioned spatial molecule generation. Our findings reveal a clear pattern in LLM spatial capabilities: while they still lag behind state-of-the-art approaches, they are promising and can handle multiple spatial constraints simultaneously, enabling scaling to heterogeneous setups.
summary: 基于结构的药物设计(SBDD)利用蛋白靶点的3D结构生成候选结合分子。扩散模型主导高质量3D分子生成，基于LLM的方法在分子设计中快速崛起。本文系统分析当前通用LLM在导航复杂3D约束方面相较于专门扩散模型基线的表现。考虑条件于蛋白袋的3D配体生成，加上配体和相互作用衍生的空间约束（锚定片段、药效团点和强制性口袋-配体相互作用）。为此引入3D-Fit——一种token高效的基准测试策略，评估LLM在多条件空间分子生成上的表现。发现清晰模式：LLM的空间能力虽落后于SOTA方法但有前景，能同时处理多个空间约束，支持扩展到异构设置。

title: LLMs and Agentic AI Systems for Smart Grids: A Tutorial on Architectures and Applications
raw_summary: Large language models (LLMs) and agentic AI systems have evolved from natural language tasks to using external tools to plan, retrieve, and act in technical domains. In smart grids, recent work applies agentic schemes to forecasting, optimization, and control, wrapping trusted solvers behind language interfaces and orchestrating multi-step workflows. The literature lacks a unified approach to designing and evaluating such systems. LLMs can produce numerically plausible yet physically infeasible outputs, evaluation protocols vary across tasks, and the boundary between what the model should and should not compute is implicit. This paper presents a solver-grounded design principle: a numerical result is reported only when it originates from a trusted tool and passes explicit verification. We review the building blocks of LLM and agentic AI systems for power systems: prompting strategies and agentic architectures. We instantiate the principle in four case studies: wind power forecasting, EV charging scheduling, power flow analysis, and contingency diagnosis, each comparing an LLM-only baseline against its solver-grounded counterpart on identical data and metrics. EVAgent reproduces the CVXPY optimum while reducing LLM-only unmet energy by 7.5-9.5x, and GridDebugAgent repairs 17/39 contingency cases while reducing total violations by 52.3%. We propose a four-group evaluation framework spanning task utility, solver-grounded correctness, faithfulness and safe failure, and cost and latency. A consistent division of labor emerges: the agentic system reliably orchestrates, retrieves, and explains, while trusted tools compute and a verification gate decides what is reported.
summary: 大语言模型和智能体AI系统已从自然语言任务演化为使用外部工具在技术领域规划、检索和行动。在智能电网中，近期工作将智能体方案应用于预测、优化和控制，将可信求解器包装在语言接口后编排多步工作流。本文提出求解器接地设计原则：数值结果仅在源自可信工具并通过显式验证时才报告。回顾了电力系统中LLM和智能体AI系统的构建模块：提示策略和智能体架构。在四个案例研究中实例化了该原则：风电功率预测、EV充电调度、潮流分析和故障诊断。EVAgent复现CVXPY最优解同时将纯LLM未满足能量降低7.5-9.5倍，GridDebugAgent修复39例故障中的17例并将总违规减少52.3%。本文提出四组评估框架：任务效用、求解器接地正确性、忠实度和安全失效、成本和延迟。

title: Differentiable Logic Gate Networks for Low-Latency EEG Classification on Edge Devices
raw_summary: Real-time EEG classification on edge devices is bottlenecked by the floating-point arithmetic of conventional neural networks. We investigated Differentiable Logic Gate Networks (Diff-Logic) as a hardware-native alternative that compiles models into pure Boolean circuits executable via bitwise CPU operations. Through rigorous iso-parameter experiments across four EEG datasets spanning two classification tasks, binary dementia detection and 3-class emotion recognition, we compared Diff-Logic against matched-capacity Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP) and Binarized Neural Network (BNN) baselines at four complexity tiers (50k-500k parameters). On dementia screening, Diff-Logic achieved 80.2% Macro F1, outperforming the MLP baseline by 6.8%. On emotion recognition, the MLP retained a moderate performance advantage but incurred a 2.3$\times$ higher latency and 14$\times$ larger model size when deployed on a power-constrained (7W) Nvidia Jetson Orin Nano CPU (Single-core). Critically, Diff-Logic inference time remained nearly constant across a 10$\times$ increase in model scale, achieving a peak speedup of 2.9$\times$ over MLPs at the largest complexity tier. Our results establish logic-based neural architectures as a practical paradigm for resource-constrained brain-computer interfaces, achieving competitive or superior performance while natively satisfying the latency and memory constraints of portable edge deployment. Code is available on GitHub: https://github.com/Shyamal-Dharia/eeg-difflogic
summary: 边缘设备上的实时EEG分类受限于传统神经网络的浮点运算。本文研究可微逻辑门网络(Diff-Logic)作为硬件原生替代方案，将模型编译为纯布尔电路，通过CPU位运算执行。在四个EEG数据集上（涵盖两种分类任务：二元痴呆检测和三类情感识别），在五个复杂度层级（50k-500k参数）进行了严格的等参数实验。在痴呆筛查中，Diff-Logic达到80.2% Macro F1，超越MLP基线6.8%。在情感识别中，MLP虽有适度性能优势但在7W功耗Nvidia Jetson Orin Nano CPU上延迟高2.3倍、模型大小大14倍。关键的是，Diff-Logic推理时间在模型规模增加10倍时几乎保持不变，在最大复杂度层级实现相对于MLP 2.9倍峰值加速。结果确立了基于逻辑的神经网络架构作为资源受限脑机接口的实用范式。

title: Lossless-INR: Lossless Volumetric Implicit Neural Representations
raw_summary: Implicit neural representation (INR) methods provide continuous coordinate-to-value mappings and integrate naturally with direct volume rendering, making them attractive for representing volumetric data. However, existing INR-based approaches for volumetric data are inherently lossy, and even small reconstruction errors can propagate through rendering and downstream analysis. In this work, we explore Lossless-INR, a lossless INR framework for 3D scientific volumetric data based on bit-plane decomposition. By decomposing each voxel value into binary bit-planes, we reformulate reconstruction as per-bit binary classification, so that exact recovery reduces to predicting every bit correctly. To make this optimization tractable while keeping the representation compact, we combine an octree block-partitioning strategy that adaptively subdivides complex regions with a ternary feature-grid network whose grid entries are parameterized by a ternary set of values. Experiments on diverse volumetric datasets show that this design can achieve zero bit-error rate and bit-exact reconstruction, enabling faithful rendering and downstream analysis with a compact representation. The code is available at https://github.com/TouKaienn/Lossless-INR.
summary: 隐式神经表示(INR)方法提供连续坐标到值的映射，与直接体积渲染天然集成。然而现有基于INR的体积数据方法本质上有损，微小重建误差会通过渲染和下游分析传播。本文探索Lossless-INR——一种基于位平面分解的无损INR框架，面向3D科学体积数据。通过将每个体素值分解为二进制位平面，将重建reformulate为逐位二分类，使得精确恢复简化为正确预测每一位。为使优化可行并保持表示紧凑，结合八叉树块分区策略自适应细分复杂区域与三元特征网格网络（网格条目由三元值集合参数化）。在多样体积数据集上的实验表明，该设计可实现零位错误率和位精确重建，以紧凑表示实现忠实渲染和下游分析。代码已开源。

title: Plenoptic Condensation: A Novel Approach to Generalized Scene Reconstruction
raw_summary: We present a novel Generalized Scene Reconstruction (GSR) approach called Plenoptic Condensation (PCon). PCon uses a multi-stage reconstruction pipeline, initially converting images into "soupy" scene elements with low (representational) power, then adaptively condensing the "soup" into "structured" elements of higher power capable of efficiently representing, for example, sharp edges and smooth reflective surfaces. PCon scene models called Reality Models (Relms) enable spatially varying representational power, which is essential for high-fidelity rendering, measurement, and scene understanding. We showcase several in-the-wild PCon reconstructions captured with consumer phone cameras and drones. In one case called "Damaged Fiat", PCon is benchmarked against two state-of-the-art (SOTA) GSR methods: NeRO and RT-Splatting. Referring to Figure 1 below, PCon reconstructs the car hood more than twice as accurately as the SOTA methods. But more importantly, the local damage profile error for PCon is 35 um (0.035 mm), whereas the two other SOTA methods are essentially unable to measure the damage at all. Our project website is available at https://quidient.github.io/pcon-2026.html.
summary: 本文提出新型广义场景重建(GSR)方法Plenoptic Condensation(PCon)。PCon使用多阶段重建管线，最初将图像转换为低表征力的"汤状"场景元素，然后自适应地将"汤"凝聚为高表征力的"结构化"元素（如锐利边缘和光滑反射表面）。PCon场景模型称为Reality Models(Relms)，启用空间变化的表征力，这对高保真渲染、测量和场景理解至关重要。展示了使用消费级手机摄像头和无人机捕获的野外PCon重建。在"Damaged Fiat"案例中，PCon重建汽车引擎盖的准确度是SOTA方法(NeRO和RT-Splatting)的两倍以上，局部损伤剖面误差仅35微米，而其他SOTA方法几乎无法测量损伤。

title: Robust Multimodal Dynamic Object Segmentation
raw_summary: Dynamic object segmentation plays a critical role in many visual applications such as static scene reconstruction from dynamic videos. However, existing optical flow-based methods fail to ensure consistent static/dynamic segmentation along object boundaries, while 3D reconstruction-based approaches are highly sensitive to reconstruction errors. To address these limitations, we present a dynamic object segmentation framework that can generate both precise and complete dynamic masks by integrating multimodal cues including 2D point tracks, 3D reconstruction, and semantic information. We design a network combining Transformer architectures with feature clustering aggregation modules to perform static/dynamic classification of multimodal feature trajectories. It enables the model to adaptively determine which type of feature should dominate based on the characteristics of each scene, while also mitigating the impact of feature degradation. Additionally, we introduce a novel point-query-based SAM post-processing method capable of handling multiple objects within a single mask. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance in both dynamic object segmentation and static scene reconstruction tasks.
summary: 动态对象分割在从动态视频进行静态场景重建等视觉应用中起关键作用。现有光流方法无法沿对象边界确保一致的静态/动态分割，基于3D重建的方法对重建误差高度敏感。本文提出整合多模态线索（2D点追踪、3D重建和语义信息）的动态对象分割框架，生成精确完整的动态掩码。设计了结合Transformer架构和特征聚类聚合模块的网络，执行多模态特征轨迹的静态/动态分类。使模型能根据场景特征自适应决定哪种特征主导，同时缓解特征退化影响。还引入新型点查询SAM后处理方法，能处理单掩码中的多个对象。大量实验证明该方法在动态对象分割和静态场景重建任务上达到SOTA性能。

title: TRIM: Reducing AI-Generated CodeSlop via Agent Trajectory Minimization
raw_summary: Coding agents are increasingly used to accelerate code generation in many downstream tasks, such as fixing bugs, building applications, and prototyping. However, despite their value as coding assistants, agent-generated code tends to be larger and more verbose than the corresponding human-written implementation. In this work, we show that the cause lies in the agent's own search process: while iterating toward a passing solution, an agent accumulates speculative edits, abandoned hypotheses, and temporary changes that persist into the final patch. This may seem harmless for a single patch, but the problem compounds as agents take responsibility for ever-larger portions of a codebase-a codebase that was once minimal and well-maintained slowly accumulates redundancy faster than it can be cleaned up, drifting to a state that is harder to maintain. Given the magnitude of this problem, we take a step towards alleviating this issue. First, we formally define this phenomenon as CodeSlop-the residual and functionally unnecessary edits commonly seen in AI-generated code. We then introduce our algorithm TRIM (Trajectory-guided Redundancy Identification and Minimization). Rather than minimizing CodeSlop directly, TRIM instead minimizes agent trajectories. As we show empirically, this indirect technique of minimizing CodeSlop is highly effective: TRIM cuts CodeSlop by 17.9%-32.9% across agentic scaffolds, with negligible performance regression. TRIM is also highly efficient, requiring roughly half the validation cost of algorithmic baselines such as Delta Debugging.
summary: 编码代理越来越多地被用于加速代码生成，但代理生成的代码往往比相应的人工编写实现更大更冗长。本文证明问题根源在于代理自身的搜索过程：在迭代寻找通过解决方案时，代理积累了推测性编辑、放弃假设和临时变更，这些残留在最终补丁中。随着代理接管越来越大的代码库，问题不断累积——曾经精简良好的代码库迅速积累冗余。本文正式定义此现象为CodeSlop（AI生成代码中常见的残留和功能不必要编辑），并提出TRIM算法（轨迹引导冗余识别与最小化）。TRIM不是直接最小化CodeSlop而是最小化代理轨迹，间接技术高效削减CodeSlop 17.9%-32.9%，性能退化可忽略，且验证成本仅为Delta Debugging等算法基线的一半。

title: OR Else: A Differentiable Trust Region for Policy Optimization
raw_summary: PPO and the GRPO baseline studied here use clipped surrogate objectives whose favorable-direction saturation introduces an abrupt change in the scalar objective's derivative. We ask whether Output Reset (OR), a smooth one-sided saturation rule, offers a useful alternative for large language model post-training. PPO-OR and GRPO-OR replace the clipped policy term with an OR squared-margin loss in rollout-relative token log-ratio space; the advantage sign determines the update direction, and a token contributes zero direct OR residual after crossing the favorable margin. We compare PPO-clip with PPO-OR under generalized advantage estimation (GAE), and GRPO with GRPO-OR under group-relative advantages, using \texttt{Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct} on Anthropic \texttt{hh-rlhf} with one shared reward model and three seeds per method. Under GAE, PPO-OR has a mean final training-time reward-model score $0.305$ higher than PPO-clip, with a larger observed across-seed spread. Under group-relative advantages, GRPO-OR does not have a higher mean score, but shows a smaller observed spread, a near-zero terminal OR residual, and a declining overshoot fraction, while the matched GRPO clipped-objective trace remains variable. Both group-relative methods exhibit substantially larger rollout-to-current log-ratio displacement than the GAE methods, and OR does not consistently reduce it. Thus, OR changes optimization behavior in both matched comparisons, but the observed reward effect differs between them. At $G=2$, the GRPO-OR diagnostics do not translate into a reward-score gain. Whether larger groups change this outcome remains open. The reported scores are training-time reward-model measurements, not held-out human-preference performance.
summary: PPO和GRPO基线使用裁剪代理目标，其有利方向饱和引入了标量目标导数的突变。本文探讨输出重置(OR)——一种平滑的单侧饱和规则——是否可为大语言模型后训练提供有用替代。PPO-OR和GRPO-OR在rollout相对token log-ratio空间中用OR平方边际损失替换裁剪策略项。在Anthropic hh-rlhf上使用Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct实验：GAE下PPO-OR比PPO-clip均值最终训练时奖励模型分数高0.305；组相对优势下GRPO-OR均值不更高但展现更小跨种子散布、近零终端OR残差和递减超调分数。两种组相对方法展现出显著大于GAE方法的rollout到当前log-ratio位移。OR在两种匹配比较中改变了优化行为，但奖励效果因方法而异。

title: A Continual Validation, Updating, and Decision-Making Framework for Self-Adaptive Digital Twins via Robust Model Predictive Control: A Case Study in Additive Manufacturing
raw_summary: Digital Twins rely on surrogate models to mirror physical systems in real time, yet these models can degrade as operating conditions evolve, a phenomenon known as concept drift. Maintaining surrogate fidelity under drift, particularly when models must also capture aleatoric uncertainty, remains an open challenge. Existing adaptive frameworks lack principled mechanisms for detecting when updates are needed, for efficiently adapting models from limited streaming data, and for certifying that updates genuinely improve predictive performance. Here we present an adaptive Digital Twin framework that integrates a Fisher score--based multivariate drift detector, Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) for parameter-efficient continual learning, and a Mann--Whitney $U$ test for online statistical validation. The framework monitors surrogate-model confidence via Fisher score vectors, triggers targeted fine-tuning of fewer than 1% of model parameters upon drift detection, and statistically certifies predictive improvement before deploying the updated surrogate. Applied to a stochastic linear system and a directed energy deposition additive manufacturing process as case studies, the framework successfully detects distributional shifts with short delays and restores both predictive accuracy and uncertainty quantification under abrupt and incremental drift. These results establish a statistically rigorous and computationally tractable pathway for sustaining the trustworthiness of neural-network--based Digital Twins throughout their operational life cycle.
summary: 数字孪生依赖代理模型实时镜像物理系统，但这些模型会随工况演化而退化（概念漂移）。本文提出一种自适应数字孪生框架，整合基于Fisher得分的多变量漂移检测器、用于参数高效持续学习的低秩自适应(LoRA)，以及用于在线统计验证的Mann-Whitney U检验。框架通过Fisher得分向量监控代理模型置信度，检测到漂移后触发少于1%模型参数的定向微调，并在部署更新前统计验证预测改进。在随机线性系统和定向能量沉积增材制造工艺的案例研究中，该框架成功以短延迟检测分布偏移，在突发和渐进漂移下恢复预测准确性和不确定性量化。结果为维持神经网络数字孪生在运营生命周期中的可信度建立了统计学严谨且计算可行的路径。

title: FlashRT: Agent Harness for Guiding Agents to Deploy Real-Time Multimodal Applications
raw_summary: Real-time multimodal applications, including voice agents and interactive video generation, compose heterogeneous models into pipelines whose efficient deployment requires application-specific decisions about placement, streaming, and intra-model parallelism. Existing serving systems and auto-parallelism compilers commit to limited transformations and fixed workload assumptions, so achieving high performance on a new application requires hand-crafting an efficient implementation. We present FlashRT, an agent harness that guides coding agents to lift simple developer-written reference implementations into optimized multi-GPU deployments that flexibly weigh target metrics like latency and throughput. Using a new chain-of-program paradigm, FlashRT directs a generic coding agent through a multi-pass transformation process where an agent transforms the reference into an intermediate representation (IR) to capture data dependencies and persistent-state scopes, validates this IR via a sequential interpreter, and performs static analyses to identify candidate transformations. Then, the agent iteratively implements, verifies, and benchmarks each candidate under a measurement-gated optimization loop to produce effective deployments that span different hardware budgets. Across various applications, including video world models and multimodal LLMs, FlashRT converts reference implementations into highly efficient deployments, delivering up to ~70x latency reduction and 2.8x throughput improvement on NVIDIA B200 GPUs. On AMD MI355X GPUs, FlashRT matches the peak latency reduction while increasing peak throughput improvement to 3.6x, demonstrating that agent-driven optimization can be more scalable on platforms with less mature expert optimization. In fact, for Qwen3-Omni text-to-audio inference, FlashRT reduces response latency by 65% compared to the expert vLLM-Omni implementation on AMD MI355X.
summary: 实时多模态应用（包括语音代理和交互式视频生成）将异构模型组合为流水线，其高效部署需要关于放置、流式传输和模型内并行的应用特定决策。现有 serving 系统和自动并行编译器局限于有限变换和固定工作负载假设。本文提出FlashRT——一种引导编码代理将开发者编写的参考实现转换为优化多GPU部署的代理框架。FlashRT通过链式编程范式指导通用编码代理进行多遍变换：将参考实现转换为捕获数据依赖性和持久状态范围的中间表示(IR)，通过顺序解释器验证IR，并进行静态分析识别候选变换。代理在测量门控优化循环中迭代实现、验证和基准测试每个候选，生产高效部署。在视频世界模型和多模态LLM等多种应用中，FlashRT将参考实现转换为高度高效部署，在NVIDIA B200 GPU上实现最高~70倍延迟降低和2.8倍吞吐量提升。在AMD MI355X上，FlashRT匹配峰值延迟降低同时将吞吐量提升增至3.6倍。

title: VEHBench: A Stage-Local Diagnostic Benchmark for LLM-Assisted Vibration Energy Harvester Design
raw_summary: Battery-free Internet of Things (IoT) requires iterative design of vibration energy harvesters (VEHs) under coupled physical constraints, while LLMs are emerging as interface layers for engineering workflows. However, existing engineering benchmarks primarily assess final artifact validity, offering limited insights into how LLMs behave across different stages of coupled physical design. We introduce VEHBench, an engineering-native diagnostic benchmark for LLM-assisted VEH design, featuring 763 literature-grounded tasks scored by an analytical physical oracle. VEHBench evaluates four design roles: specification triage, verifier-guided search, corrupted-state recovery, and policy-conditioned selection. Experimental results reveal that LLM capability is strongly stage-dependent: no single model consistently dominates the entire workflow, and response-control profiles expose distinct behavioral patterns across design roles. VEHBench thus provides a stage-aware foundation for evaluating, selecting, routing, and improving verifier-grounded engineering LLMs. The benchmark artifact is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/AnonymousVehbench/vehbench
summary: 无电池物联网需要在耦合物理约束下迭代设计振动能量收集器(VEH)，而LLM正成为工程工作流的接口层。现有工程基准主要评估最终工件有效性，对LLM在耦合物理设计各阶段的行为提供有限洞察。本文引入VEHBench——面向LLM辅助VEH设计的工程原生诊断基准，包含763个文献支撑的任务并由分析物理预言机评分。评估四种设计角色：规范分诊、验证器引导搜索、损坏状态恢复和政策条件选择。实验揭示LLM能力强烈依赖阶段——没有单一模型在整个工作流中始终占优，响应控制模式暴露出不同设计角色间的独特行为模式。VEHBench为评估、选择、路由和改进验证器接地工程LLM提供了阶段感知基础。基准已在Hugging Face开源。

title: EVOLVE: Efficient Learned Volume Compression with Variable-Rate Encoding on a Cross-Domain Database
raw_summary: Large-scale scientific simulations generate volumetric data at rates that far outpace advances in storage and network bandwidth, making effective lossy compression increasingly critical. However, conventional compressors often struggle to preserve fine structural details at high compression ratios (CRs), and implicit neural representations (INRs) require costly per-volume optimization and produce models with fixed CRs. To respond, we present EVOLVE, an autoencoder (AE)-based volume-compression framework that targets high CRs for offline compression, with three key contributions. First, we construct a large-scale cross-domain database of 6,376 volumes from 21 scientific simulations, curated via perceptual hashing to ensure diversity, enabling the optimized model to extract features that generalize across volumes within the covered scientific simulation domains. Second, we reexamine the design space of AE-based compressors and incorporate several macro- and micro-designs into a vanilla AE to develop EVOLVE, which substantially improves the expressive power and compression capability. Third, we develop a learnable gain mechanism with a three-stage training strategy to enable variable-rate encoding, allowing a single model to support continuous CR adjustment at inference time. Experiments on multiple unseen scientific simulation datasets demonstrate that EVOLVE achieves substantially higher CRs than conventional compressors at comparable reconstruction quality, while delivering compression speeds that are orders of magnitude faster than INR-based methods, highlighting its promise as a strong alternative for compressing scientific data. The code, model weights, and results are available on our project page at https://evolve-vis.github.io.
summary: 大规模科学模拟产生的体积数据速率远超存储和网络带宽的进步。传统压缩器在高压缩比下难以保留精细结构细节，隐式神经表示(INR)则需要昂贵的逐体积优化且产生固定压缩比的模型。本文提出EVOLVE——一种基于自编码器的体积压缩框架，面向离线高压缩比。三大贡献：(1)构建了包含21个科学模拟、6376个体积的大规模跨域数据库，通过感知哈希确保多样性；(2)重新审视自编码器压缩器设计空间，在基础架构中整合多项宏微观设计；(3)开发了带三阶段训练策略的可学习增益机制，实现可变率编码，单个模型支持推理时连续压缩比调整。在多个未见科学模拟数据集上，EVOLVE在相当重建质量下实现远高于传统压缩器的压缩比，压缩速度比INR方法快数个数量级。

title: Certified Training for Convolutional Perturbations
raw_summary: Vision models have been found to be susceptible to perturbations such as motion blur induced at runtime by a shaking camera. This impedes their deployment in critical applications since phenomena such as slightly blurred vision might lead to failures, for example an object detector missing objects. While methods such as data augmentation or Adversarial Training can improve empirical robustness, they lack formal safety guarantees, making it difficult to identify and mitigate hidden vulnerabilities. We introduce a novel Certified Training approach that leverages an efficient encoding of convolutional perturbations to train provably robust models. Our method significantly outperforms Adversarial Training, achieving, for example, over 80% robust accuracy against motion blur of reasonable intensity on CIFAR10 while maintaining comparable standard accuracy.
summary: 视觉模型被发现易受运行时扰动（如相机抖动导致的运动模糊）影响，阻碍其在关键应用中的部署。数据增强或对抗训练等方法虽能改善经验鲁棒性，但缺乏正式安全保证。本文引入一种新型认证训练方法，利用卷积扰动的有效编码来训练可证明鲁棒的模型。该方法显著优于对抗训练，在CIFAR10上对合理强度的运动模糊实现了超过80%的鲁棒准确率，同时保持可比的标准准确率。

title: Three-Body Scattering for Generative Modeling
raw_summary: Modern generative models typically rely on an adversarial critic, a prescribed noise-to-data path, or an autoregressive factorization. Instead, we show that a proper distributional energy can induce sample-level motion and provide direct regression supervision for a one-step generator. Three-Body Scattering Modeling (TBSM) for generation turns the energy distance into a constant-size per-projectile interaction: each projectile is attracted toward one real source and repelled from one independently generated source. Conditioned on the projectile and its condition, its expectation equals the $2$-Wasserstein gradient-flow velocity of $\frac12D_E^2(P_θ,Q)$. A batch of $B$ frozen-target events yields $O(B)$ sample-level losses, each using one reference for its condition instead of the minibatch-wide all-pairs field used by methods such as Drifting Models. Tracking this conditional expectation online can reduce field noise. Using scattering in frozen image features, TBSM trains one-step generators on ImageNet-256, achieving FID${}=2.23$ with pixel-space PixelDiT-XL and FID${}=1.63$ with latent-space DiT-XL at NFE${}=1$. We provide a design map relating diffusion-related supervision, Drift-like dynamics, and GAN-like objectives. These results establish tracked scattering as a route to high-dimensional one-step generation. Code: https://github.com/sp12138/TBSM.
summary: 现代生成模型依赖对抗批评、预设噪声到数据路径或自回归分解。本文提出三体散射建模(TBSM)——利用分布能量诱导样本级运动并为一步生成器提供直接回归监督。TBSM将能量距离转化为恒定大小的每弹丸交互：每个弹丸被一个真实源吸引并被一个独立生成源排斥。在冻结图像特征上使用散射，TBSM在ImageNet-256上训练一步生成器，在NFE=1时达到PixelDiT-XL的FID=2.23和DiT-XL的FID=1.63。提供了扩散相关监督、Drift类动态和GAN类目标之间的关系设计地图。结果确立了跟踪散射作为高维一步生成的途径。代码已开源。

title: PPL-Factory: Task-Aware and Budget-Aware Data Selection from Language Modeling to Reasoning
raw_summary: Not all training samples contribute equally to large language model fine-tuning. Selecting informative training samples can reduce the computational cost while preserving downstream performance. Many existing data selection methods rely on indirect heuristics, such as data quality, diversity or reasoning trace length. However, the effectiveness of these fixed criteria is task-dependent and difficult to generalize across diverse downstream tasks. Perplexity-based data selection provides a simple and model-aware solution to estimate the sample difficulty, but existing approaches typically score the entire training sequence and ignore the difference in learning objectives of language modeling and reasoning tasks. In this paper, we propose PPL-Factory, a simple and interpretable data selection framework that combines task-aware perplexity-based scores and data budget-aware selection criteria. Experiments on GSM8K demonstrate that PPL-Factory outperforms other state-of-the-art data selection methods using only $1\%$ of the training set. With $10\%$ of the data, PPL-Factory exceeds full-data fine-tuning accuracy by 0.9 on GSM8K and 4.8 on MATH. Overall, our results demonstrate that task-aware and budget-aware perplexity-based selection provides an effective and applicable approach for efficient fine-tuning.
summary: 并非所有训练样本对LLM微调的贡献都相同。本文提出PPL-Factory——一种简单可解释的数据选择框架，结合任务感知困惑度评分和数据预算感知选择标准。现有困惑度方法通常对整个训练序列打分并忽略语言建模和推理任务的学习目标差异。PPL-Factory区分这两种目标，提出针对性的困惑度评分。在GSM8K上的实验表明：仅用1%训练集就超越其他SOTA数据选择方法；用10%数据时，在GSM8K上超越全数据微调0.9分，在MATH上超越4.8分。结果证明任务感知和预算感知的困惑度选择为高效微调提供了有效且实用的方法。

title: Learning Adaptive Safety Margins for Visual Navigation
raw_summary: Robots in cluttered indoor spaces often fail not because they cannot generate collision-free paths, but because a fixed safety margin is mis-calibrated: conservative margins cause detours and timeouts, while permissive margins lead to near-boundary shortcuts under perception bias. Diffusion-based planners propose diverse trajectory candidates from egocentric RGB-D, yet reliable selection remains the bottleneck. We propose a context-conditioned safety critic that learns an adaptive clearance preference for ranking diffusion proposals, decomposed into three complementary terms: (i) a safety term with a clearance-budget penalty and a control-barrier-function residual for waypoint- and transition-wise safety, (ii) an efficiency term combining a smoothness penalty with a safety-gated detour-ratio penalty that avoids detours without incentivizing risky shortcuts, and (iii) a distance-constraint matching term that anchors the learned budget to realized ESDF clearances to prevent margin collapse. We train the critic with privileged ESDF geometry in simulation and distill it into a perception-only selector via a two-stage teacher-student procedure. On PointGoal navigation in HM3D and MP3D, including cross-dataset transfer, our method achieves the highest success rate (SR) and success weighted by path length (SPL) among strong diffusion, optimization, and RL baselines. Trained purely in simulation, it transfers to a Unitree G1 humanoid and navigates cluttered indoor scenes without task-specific tuning.
summary: 拥挤室内空间中的机器人导航失败往往不是因为无法生成无碰撞路径，而是因为固定安全裕度校准不当：保守裕度导致绕路和超时，宽松裕度在感知偏差下导致贴边捷径。本文提出一种条件安全评判器，学习扩散提案排序的自适应间距偏好，分解为三项互补项：(1)安全项——含间距预算惩罚和控制障碍函数残差；(2)效率项——结合平滑惩罚和安全门控绕路比惩罚；(3)距离约束匹配项——将学习到的预算锚定到实现的ESDF间距以防止裕度坍缩。在仿真中使用特权ESDF几何训练，通过两阶段教师-学生过程蒸馏为纯感知选择器。在HM3D和MP3D的PointGoal导航任务（含跨数据集迁移）中，该方法在强扩散、优化和RL基线上实现了最高成功率和SPL指标。纯仿真训练的方法成功迁移到Unitree G1人形机器人，无需任务特定调参即可导航拥挤室内场景。

title: Unveiling Invariant and Transferable Latent Factors Across Heterogeneous Environments via ATLAS
raw_summary: This paper considers a multi-environment factor model in which high-dimensional covariates are collected from heterogeneous environments, with auxiliary labels available in a subset of these environments. The joint distribution of the covariates may vary across environments, whereas the latent structure is decomposed into invariant factors with shared loadings and heterogeneous factors with environment-specific loadings. Such a model is motivated by transfer learning and latent factor regression, where one seeks stable low-dimensional representations for both interpretation and robust out-of-sample prediction of the response $Y$. Leveraging the invariance principle, we show that the invariant and heterogeneous factors are disentangled under a minimal structural condition. Based on this, we propose ATLAS, an Auxiliary-label and invariance-guided Transfer via Latent Alignment across heterogeneous environmentS. ATLAS is a unified procedure that leverages the invariance principle to separate aligned invariant and unaligned heterogeneous factors, and further exploits supervision from auxiliary labels to extract prediction-invariant and transferable factors from those unaligned heterogeneous factors. ATLAS yields near-oracle performance for downstream latent factor regression, enables transferable prediction in new environments through the full latent signal when auxiliary labels are available, and reduces to robust invariant-factor-only prediction otherwise. We establish sharp non-asymptotic error bounds for recovering invariant and heterogeneous factors, identifying all the response-invariant factors, and estimating the invariant signal in $Y$.
summary: 本文考虑多环境因子模型，其中高维协变量从异质环境中收集，辅助标签在部分环境中可用。协变量的联合分布在环境间可能变化，潜在结构分解为具有共享载荷的不变因子和具有环境特定载荷的异质因子。基于不变性原理，证明了在最小结构条件下不变和异质因子可被解耦。提出ATLAS（辅助标签和不变性引导的跨异质环境潜在对齐转移），这是一个统一过程：利用不变性原理分离对齐不变因子和对齐异质因子，并利用辅助标签监督从未对齐异质因子中提取预测不变和可转移因子。ATLAS在下游潜在因子回归中达到近oracle性能，通过完整潜在信号实现新环境中的可转移预测。建立了恢复不变和异质因子、识别所有响应不变因子和估计响应不变信号的尖锐非渐近误差界。

title: SWE-Pruner Pro: The Coder LLM Already Knows What to Prune
raw_summary: Pruning long context for coding agents has been a vital technology for efficient context management. While existing context pruning methods such as SWE-Pruner realize this by attaching a separate code classifier, we find the agent itself encodes internal representations indicating the relevance of code context when reading tool output. Based on this finding, we propose SWE-Pruner Pro, which prunes tool outputs directly inside the agent. Concretely, a small head turns the agent's own internal representations into a keep-or-prune label for each line, with a length-aware embedding keyed to each tool output's line count. Across two open-weight backbones and four multi-turn benchmarks, SWE-Pruner Pro saves up to 39% of prompt and completion tokens while preserving task quality, with bounded inference overhead. Notably, on MiMo-V2-Flash SWE-Pruner Pro additionally raises the SWE-Bench Verified resolve rate by +3.8% and the long-context Oolong accuracy by +2.2 points.
summary: 为编码代理修剪长上下文是实现高效上下文管理的关键技术。现有方法如SWE-Pruner通过附加独立代码分类器实现。本文发现代理自身在阅读工具输出时编码了指示代码上下文相关性的内部表示。据此提出SWE-Pruner Pro——直接在代理内部修剪工具输出。具体而言，一个小头将代理的自身内部表示转换为每行代码的保留/修剪标签，配合长度感知嵌入 keyed 到每工具输出的行数。在两个开源骨干和四个多轮基准上，SWE-Pruner Pro节省高达39%的提示和补全token同时保持任务质量，推理开销有界。在MiMo-V2-Flash上额外将SWE-Bench Verified解决率提高+3.8%，长上下文Oolong准确率提高+2.2分。

title: HOMIE: Human-object Centric Video Personalization via Multimodal Intelligent Enchancement
raw_summary: Human-object centric video personalization (HOCVP) is a core task within subject-driven video generation. However, existing methods suffer from two key limitations. First, most approaches focusing on inter-subject personalization still struggle to strike a balance between high subject fidelity and accurate interaction patterns between humans and diverse objects, especially when objects represent abstract concepts such as logos. Second, while intra-subject references (e.g., OCR maps, multi-view inputs) are expected to enhance subject fidelity, most existing works lack mechanisms to understand such latent correspondence. To address both challenges, we propose HOMIE, an HOCVP framework that tackles both inter- and intra-subject input settings in a unified manner. Compared to previous approaches, HOMIE proposes a better MLLM integration strategy to extract knowledge of reference-level relationships without compromising the controllability of text encoders or incurring costly re-alignment. Specifically, we introduce global multimodal guidance within self-attention to better align MLLM-derived semantic features with VAE tokens. Furthermore, we propose modality-reference embedding to differentiate tokens from MLLM features and VAE tokens and associate intra-subject reference image tokens. Extensive experiments validate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance across various HOCVP tasks. Project Page: https://yiyangcai.github.io/homie-page.github.io/
summary: 以人为中心的视频个性化(HOCVP)是主题驱动视频生成的核心任务。现有方法在主体保真度和人机交互模式间难以平衡，尤其当对象代表抽象概念（如标志）时。本文提出HOMIE——一个统一处理主体间和主体内输入设置的HOCVP框架。HOMIE提出更好的多模态大语言模型(MLLM)集成策略，在不损害文本编码器可控性或产生昂贵重对齐的情况下提取参考级关系知识。具体引入自注意力内的全局多模态引导以更好地对齐MLLM派生语义特征与VAE token。还提出模态-参考嵌入以区分MLLM特征token和VAE token并关联主体内参考图像token。大量实验验证该方法在各种HOCVP任务上达到SOTA性能。

title: GigaPath-Flash and GigaTIME-Flash: Efficient Pathology Foundation Models for Whole-Slide and Tumor Microenvironment Analysis
raw_summary:
Foundation models have emerged as a driving force in computational pathology, with the potential to transform cancer diagnosis, prognosis, and treatment selection by learning transferable representations from large-scale histopathology data. A growing landscape of pathology foundation models now spans diverse data sources, architectures, and downstream applications. However, most pretrained models operate only at the image-tile level, use restrictive licenses, and remain computationally expensive, limiting large-scale slide-level clinical and research use.
  Here, we introduce GigaPath-Flash and GigaTIME-Flash, efficient models for whole-slide pathology AI and spatial proteomics prediction. GigaPath-Flash combines a 22M-parameter ViT-S tile encoder with a 21M-parameter LongNet slide encoder, both pretrained on large-scale real-world histopathology data. Its compact tile encoder is distilled from the billion-parameter GigaPath (ViT-g) teacher and shared by both models. GigaPath-Flash retains 97% of GigaPath's average slide-level performance with 50x less compute. GigaTIME-Flash extends this backbone to predict the tumor immune microenvironment directly from routine H&E images. It surpasses the original CNN-based GigaTIME in prediction quality while running 6x faster and using 8x less GPU memory.
  Together with GigaPath and GigaTIME, these models form an open-weight, Apache-2.0-licensed family pretrained on large-scale real-world clinical data. By releasing all models and weights, we provide accessible building blocks for computational pathology, immuno-oncology, and precision health.
summary: 基础模型已成为计算病理学的驱动力，有望通过从大规模组织病理学数据中学习可转移表示来变革癌症诊断、预后和治疗选择。然而大多数预训练模型仅在图像块级别运行、使用限制性许可证且计算昂贵。本文引入GigaPath-Flash和GigaTIME-Flash——面向全切片病理AI和空间蛋白质组学预测的高效模型。GigaPath-Flash结合了22M参数的ViT-S图像块编码器和21M参数的LongNet全切片编码器，均在大规模真实世界组织病理学数据上预训练。其紧凑的图像块编码器从十亿参数的GigaPath(ViT-g)教师模型蒸馏而来。GigaPath-Flash以50倍更少算力保留了GigaPath 97%的全切片平均性能。GigaTIME-Flash扩展此骨干网络，直接从常规H&E图像预测肿瘤免疫微环境，预测质量超越原始CNN-based GigaTIME，同时运行速度快6倍、GPU显存占用少8倍。所有模型和权重以Apache-2.0许可开源。

title: Vector Search As Nearest Neighbor Matching: RAG-based Policy Learning in Causal Inference
raw_summary: We propose one-step and two-step methods for policy learning with retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). We formulate RAG-based action selection under the potential outcome framework. In the two-step method, vector search retrieves action-specific neighboring evidence in an embedding space, the generator estimates conditional expected outcomes or their contrasts, and a plug-in rule selects an action. This formulation connects action-specific vector search with nearest-neighbor matching in causal inference. We decompose the regret of the two-step method into candidate-generation regret and within-candidate choice regret, and we bound the latter using prediction-error guarantees for nearest-neighbor estimators and transformers. We evaluate the one-step method directly as a policy because its intermediate computation is unobserved.
summary: 本文提出基于检索增强生成(RAG)的策略学习方法，包括一步法和两步法。在潜在结果框架下形式化RAG动作选择：两步法中向量搜索在嵌入空间中检索动作特定的邻近证据，生成器估计条件期望结果或其对比，plug-in规则选择动作。此形式化将动作特定向量搜索与因果推断中的最近邻匹配联系起来。将两步法的遗憾分解为候选生成遗憾和候选内选择遗憾，后者使用最近邻估计器和transformers的预测误差保证进行边界。直接在策略层面评估一步法因其中间计算不可观察。

title: Causal Discovery on Irregular Time Series
raw_summary: Causal discovery methods have shown strong performance in temporal systems, but they typically rely on regular and discrete lag structures, limiting their applicability to regularly sampled data. However, many real-world tasks require dealing with irregularly sampled streams of events, such as sensor streams, healthcare data, and financial transactions. In this work, we propose an extension of PCMCI+, a state-of-the-art method for causal discovery on regular multivariate time series, to allow for handling irregular time series. Instead of modelling causal relations through fixed-lag dependencies, our method aggregates causal influence over predefined temporal windows. We evaluate our method on synthetic irregular event streams with known causal structures under different signal-to-noise ratios, showing that it consistently recovers the underlying causal graph and substantially outperforms the standard PCMCI+ on irregularly sampled data.
summary: 因果发现方法在时序系统中表现出色，但通常依赖规则和离散滞后结构，限制了其在不规则采样数据上的适用性。许多现实任务需要处理不规则采样的事件流，如传感器流、医疗数据和金融交易。本文提出PCMCI+（一种最先进的规则多元时序因果发现方法）的扩展，使其能够处理不规则时序数据。新方法不再通过固定滞后建模因果关系，而是在预定义时间窗口上聚合因果影响。在已知因果结构的合成不规则事件流上评估，在不同信噪比下均能一致恢复底层因果图，在规则采样数据上显著优于标准PCMCI+。

title: FlowMimic: Mask-free Visual Editing and Generation with Pixel-pair Warped Flow Field for Online Video Editing Data Generation and Modality Mimicry
raw_summary: In line with the prevailing direction of vision research, we explore the integration of both generation and editing capabilities for video and image modalities within a single model. Current approaches to collecting video editing data typically depend on labour-intensive, time-consuming curated procedures--involving object mask annotation, the use of error-introducing pair synthesis via I2V model and ControlNet-like guidance, and VLM-based quality filtering or refinement--and demonstrate limited task scalability. As a result, the diversity of editing tasks remains substantially narrower than that available for image editing models. We develop a pixel-pair temporal warped flow field that can directly generate corresponding video editing samples in real time from image editing samples, and we demonstrate across multiple levels of video editing tasks that a model can learn video editing using only such data. We regard the image modality as a particular form of the video modality. Accordingly, we design a modality mimic generation loss and a modality mimic editing loss to relatively align the capabilities--and thereby the output distributions--of the two modalities through mutual imitation. Moreover, language-based visual editing entails the comprehension of the editing instruction and the reference visual content, the localization of the region corresponding to that instruction within the reference visual contents, and the modification of that region alone. Existing approaches predominantly rely on external aids, such as fine-tuning an additional MLLM or explicitly supplying a mask sequence as auxiliary input during inference. In contrast, we aspire for the model to internalize this capability. To that end, we introduce sense-related tasks--for instance, referring expression segmentation--along with corresponding editing-region-aware latent-level loss and attention-level loss.
summary: 本文探索视频和图像模态的生成和编辑能力整合。当前视频编辑数据收集依赖劳动密集的手工流程——涉及对象掩码标注、I2V模型+ControlNet的成对合成和VLM质量过滤——导致编辑任务多样性远窄于图像编辑。本文开发像素对时序扭曲流场，可从图像编辑样本实时生成对应视频编辑样本，证明模型仅用此类数据即可学习视频编辑。将图像模态视为视频模态的特例，设计模态模仿生成损失和模态模仿编辑损失通过相互模仿对齐两种模态的能力。针对语言视觉编辑，引入感知相关任务（如指代表达分割）及相应的编辑区域感知潜层损失和注意力层损失，使模型内化此能力而非依赖外部辅助。

title: Logical Judgments Under Pressure: Diagnosing Syllogistic Stability with Learned Soft Prefixes
raw_summary: To test how correct logical judgments respond to learned context, we prepend a soft prefix to an exactly labeled syllogistic reasoning benchmark while keeping the model fixed. Soft prefixes are opaque continuous vectors, so we characterize them through the behavior they induce across controlled variations in logical form and interface. By studying which prefixes succeed and how their effects generalize, we characterize how learned contextual pressure can override correct judgments and expose limits in a model's logical stability. Across Qwen3.6-35B-A3B MoE, Qwen3-8B, and Gemma 4 31B, learned prefixes redirect many correct answers and remain effective across unseen forms and interface changes. In repeated tests with Qwen3.6 MoE and Gemma, they outperform paired random controls in all 16 model--direction--split comparisons by 37 to 99 percentage points. Qwen3.6 MoE flip rates remain between 72% and 90% across wording and prompt changes, while Gemma validity prefixes retain 54% to 56% flip compared with less than 1% for matched random prefixes. Diagnostic tests show that the dominant effect is a broad preference for one answer meaning rather than fixed-symbol forcing or a logical operation that transfers reliably between tasks. The form of this bias differs across models. In both Qwen models, simple score models often predict which judgments will flip but not how far their margins will move, whereas Gemma's overall response is more closely approximated by the same models. These results show that the dominant behavioral effect of successful soft prefixes is a broad answer preference, while the remaining response reveals substantial model-specific differences in logical stability.
summary: 为测试正确逻辑判断对所学上下文压力的响应，本研究在精确标注的三段论推理基准上预先添加软前缀（opaque连续向量），保持模型不变。通过在逻辑形式和接口上的受控变化来表征这些前缀的行为。研究发现，学到的前缀能改变许多正确答案，且在未见形式和接口变化上仍然有效。在Qwen3.6-35B-A3B MoE、Qwen3-8B和Gemma 4 31B上的测试显示，Qwen3.6 MoE的翻转率在措辞和提示变化间保持在72%-90%，而Gemma的有效性前缀保留54%-56%的翻转率，远超匹配随机前缀的不到1%。诊断测试表明，主导效应是一种广泛的答案偏好而非固定符号强制。不同模型的偏差形式存在差异。该研究揭示了模型逻辑稳定性的局限性和模型特异性差异。

title: Simple Domain Generalization for Strong Pixel-Level Image Tampering Detection in Modern VLMs
raw_summary: Modern vision-language models (VLMs) have significantly improved image generation and editing capabilities, making pixel-level image tampering detection increasingly important yet challenging under cross-model and out-of-distribution shifts. This work studies domain generalization for pixel-level image tampering detection in modern VLMs like ChatGPT, Gemini, Qwen-Image, etc., aiming to learn tampering localization models that remain robust across diverse VLM-generated manipulation distributions. We propose a simple yet effective domain-generalized training framework built on two practical strategies. First, we introduce a balanced minibatch sampling scheme that strategically samples tampered and real images in each minibatch, preventing biased optimization toward either manipulated artifacts or clean-image priors and avoiding training collapse, ensuring that each optimization step receives proper sampled gradient signals. Second, we adopt a simple late-injection strategy, where the detector is first trained on large-scale base data until stable convergence, and then exposed to a small amount of newly selected supporting data from emerging VLM distributions, improving adaptability without overfitting to limited new domains. Together, these components provide a simple yet strong recipe for improving pixel-level tampering localization and OOD robustness across modern VLMs. Despite the conceptual simplicity, our framework outperforms the prior state-of-the-art PIXAR by a large margin of 26.1% and 26.8% relative improvement in average gIoU and cIoU, respectively, across OOD VLMs of GPT-Images-2.0, Gemini-3.1, FLUX.2, and Seedream 4.5. Our code is available at https://github.com/VILA-Lab/PIXAR-DG
summary: 现代视觉语言模型(VLM)大幅提升了图像生成和编辑能力，使得像素级图像篡改检测变得日益重要且具有挑战性。本文研究了在跨模型和分布外偏移下的域泛化问题，提出了一种简单有效的域泛化训练框架，包含两项实用策略：一是平衡的小批量采样方案，在每个小批量中有策略地采样篡改和真实图像，防止优化偏向任一类别；二是简单的晚期注入策略，先在大规模基础数据上训练检测器直到稳定收敛，再暴露于少量来自新兴VLM分布的支持数据，在不过拟合新域的前提下提升适应性。该方法在GPT-Images-2.0、Gemini-3.1、FLUX.2和Seedream 4.5等OOD VLM上，gIoU和cIoU分别比之前SOTA的PIXAR大幅提升26.1%和26.8%。代码已开源。

title: It's Not What You Say, It's How You Say It: Evaluating LLM Responses to Expressions of Belief
raw_summary: Users frequently express their beliefs to large language models (LLMs). In some situations, the LLM should accept these contextual beliefs as true. In others, they should stick to their prior knowledge. Notably, users' expressions of belief (EoBs) can take linguistically diverse forms - using presuppositions, evidential and certainty markers, or varied tones - each of which may have a different persuasiveness over the LLMs. We introduce a typology to systematically evaluate how different EoBs affect whether models follow context versus prior knowledge. The typology is grounded in four linguistically motivated dimensions: form, evidentiality, epistemic stance, and tone, spanning 17 fine-grained types. By pairing these EoBs with world knowledge facts, we generate controlled EoB-query pairs that isolate the effect of linguistic variation. Using this benchmark, we evaluate 16 LLMs that differ in architecture (Llama3, Qwen3, Gemma3), scale (1B-30B parameters), and training stages (base vs instruct). We identify meaningful variations in response behavior across these axes, e.g., that bigger models and instruction models tend to be less context-following than smaller models and base models. We further identify specific EoBs that statistically significantly persuade LMs more consistently than others. Our work reveals systematic patterns in how linguistic framing affects LLM context integration, with implications for prompt engineering and model robustness.
summary: 用户经常向LLM表达他们的信念。在某些情况下LLM应接受这些上下文信念为真，在其他情况下应坚持先验知识。本文引入一种类型学来系统评估不同信念表达(EoB)如何影响模型遵循上下文还是先验知识。类型学基于四个语言动机维度：形式、证据性、认识论立场和语调，涵盖17种细粒度类型。将EoB与世界知识事实配对生成受控EoB-查询对以隔离语言变化的影响。评估了16个不同架构(Llama3/Qwen3/Gemma3)、规模(1B-30B参数)和训练阶段(base vs instruct)的LLM。发现更大模型和指令模型往往比小模型和基础模型更少遵循上下文。识别出特定EoB在统计上更一致地说服语言模型。揭示了语言框架如何影响LLM上下文集成的系统模式。

title: Automated Discovery Has No Universally Superior Harness
raw_summary: Autonomous discovery systems such as OpenEvolve and TTT-Discover are often used as general-purpose harnesses. However, in practice these are composite systems combining several design choices about archives, parent selection, exploration, and budget allocation into a single recipe. Because discovery runs are expensive and inherently stochastic, existing harnesses are often compared using too few independent trials to distinguish key methodological improvements from run-to-run variance. We systematically decompose OpenEvolve-style evolutionary search and the TTT-Discover search harness into its constituent components and systematically evaluate 30 budget-matched harnesses across 12 model-problem pairs using more than 3.1 million LLM rollouts and repeated-trial statistical analysis. Our results show that discovery harnesses have a generalization problem: No fixed harness is reliably superior across the evaluated model-problem pairs, and variants of OpenEvolve generally underperform simpler alternatives. Thus, harness choice is better viewed as a hyperparameter rather than as a universal recipe, and should be tailored to the specific problem and underlying model. We also find that early discovery progress predicts final performance, and use this property to present a budget-matched adaptive-allocation experiment that starts multiple harnesses, prunes weak partial runs, and reallocates compute to stronger survivors, outperforming both commitment to a randomly sampled fixed harness and a non-adaptive harness ensemble. Together, these results motivate shifting from fixed harness selection to online adaptation guided by early performance. We release all run pools including baseline null distributions for every model-problem pair as reusable statistical infrastructure against for future harness proposals.
summary: 自主发现系统（如OpenEvolve和TTT-Discover）常被用作通用探索工具。然而这些系统是多种设计选择的组合体。本文系统分解了OpenEvolve式进化搜索和TTT-Discover搜索框架的各个组成成分，在12个模型-问题对上使用超过310万次LLM采样和重复试验统计分析，评估了30种预算匹配的框架。结果表明：不存在在所有场景下都最优的统一框架，变体OpenEvolve通常不如更简单的替代方案。因此框架选择应视为超参数而非通用方案，需针对具体问题定制。研究还发现早期发现进度可以预测最终性能，据此提出了自适应分配策略——同时启动多个框架、剪枝弱运行、将算力重新分配到更强幸存者，性能优于固定框架和非自适应集成。所有运行池包括基线零分布已开源。

title: Patch Policy: Efficient Embodied Control via Dense Visual Representations
raw_summary: Pretrained dense visual features from Vision Transformers (ViTs) are powerful yet have been underutilized in robot learning. Modern robot policies either compress each observation into a single global token, or rely on visual backbones trained from scratch, sacrificing both fine-grained spatial detail and the benefits of large-scale visual pre-training. While there exist policies that do operate on dense patch features like large vision-language-action models (VLAs), they tend to be heavy and slow, inheriting the full cost of a billion-parameter vision-language model (VLM) backbone. We close this gap with Patch Policy, a minimal architectural extension that enables transformer-based policies to consume dense pre-trained patch tokens directly without the computational overhead of a full VLM. At its core is a block-causal attention mask that preserves the temporal causality of standard policies while letting the model attend over many patch tokens per observation, alongside other state information. Patch Policy is lightweight, fast, and highly effective. Across four simulated and three real-world environment suites, our method achieves a 40% relative improvement over policies using state-of-the-art global-pooled representations. Furthermore, it surpasses fine-tuned OpenVLA-OFT by 18% while using roughly 0.7% of the parameters. We believe Patch Policy provides a pipeline for the robotics community to readily leverage continuing progress in visual representation learning, without sacrificing the training efficiency or inference speed required for high-frequency, reactive control. Videos can be viewed at https://patch-policy.github.io
summary: 视觉变换器(ViT)的预训练密集视觉特征强大但在机器人学习中尚未充分利用。现代机器人策略要么将每个观测压缩为单个全局token，要么从零训练视觉骨干，牺牲了细粒度空间细节和大规模视觉预训练的好处。本文提出Patch Policy——一种极简架构扩展，使基于transformer的策略可直接消费密集预训练patch token而无须全VLM的计算开销。核心是块因果注意力掩码，保持标准策略的时间因果性同时允许模型在每个观测上关注大量patch token。在四个模拟和三个真实环境套件中，该方法相比使用SOTA全局池化表示的策略实现了40%的相对提升，超越微调OpenVLA-OFT 18%而仅使用约0.7%的参数。为机器人社区提供了利用视觉表征学习持续进步的轻量级管道。

title: The Many Senses of Visual Similarity: A Text-Prompted Image Perceptual Metric
raw_summary: Human visual similarity judgments are context-dependent. For example, two images may be similar in shape but distinct in color. Existing perceptual similarity metrics, however, collapse these nuances into a single scalar value, offering no mechanism to condition on specific aspects. To bridge this gap, we introduce a large-scale dataset of human similarity judgments over image triplets, where each triplet is annotated across multiple, free-form semantic aspects of similarity. Benchmarking a broad range of frontier vision-language models (VLMs) reveals a considerable performance gap compared to human annotators' consensus. Leveraging our data, we fine-tune a VLM to produce our Text-Prompted Image Perceptual Similarity (TPIPS) metric, capturing multiple senses of visual similarity depending on the specified text prompt. We demonstrate that TPIPS aligns more closely with human perception and generalizes reliably beyond the training distribution. Finally, we show that TPIPS unlocks new capabilities in text-guided retrieval, compositional search, and the fine-grained evaluation of generative models. Our code, data, and trained models are at https://peterwang512.github.io/TPIPS
summary: 人类视觉相似性判断具有情境依赖性——例如两张图片可能在形状上相似但在颜色上不同。现有感知相似度指标将所有细微差别压缩为单个标量值。本文引入大规模人类相似性判断数据集，对三元组图片在不同自由形式语义方面的相似性进行标注。对前沿视觉语言模型(VLM)的基准测试揭示与人类标注者共识之间存在显著性能差距。基于此数据微调VLM得到TPIPS(Text-Prompted Image Perceptual Similarity)指标，可根据指定文本提示捕获多种视觉相似性含义。TPIPS更贴近人类感知并在训练分布外可靠泛化。展示了TPIPS在文本引导检索、组合搜索和生成模型细粒度评估中的新能力。代码、数据和训练模型已开源。

title: Anthropic Fable 5 定价规则生效：Max/Team Premium 永久包含，Pro 用户不享

source: LaoZhang AI Blog / Anthropic 官方

title: 中国 Moonshot AI 发布 Kimi K3：2.8万亿参数 MoE 模型，7月27日开放权重
raw_summary: Moonshot AI 于7月16日发布 Kimi K3 旗舰模型，采用2.8万亿参数混合专家架构，支持100万 token 上下文窗口和持续推理模式。全量模型权重将于7月27日开源。该发布在 WAIC 上海世界人工智能大会上展出，引发全球市场关注，被视为中国在基础大模型领域缩小与 Anthropic/OpenAI 差距的关键一步。

title: 阿里巴巴发布 Qwen3.8-Max 预览版：2.4万亿参数多模态模型

title: 欧盟 AI 法案执法临近：2026年8月2日启动，罚款高达3500万欧元或7%全球营业额
raw_summary: 欧盟《AI法案》将于2026年8月2日正式进入执法阶段，距此不足两周。违规罚款可达3500万欧元或全球营业额的7%。首批适用义务针对营销和销售团队日常使用的工具，包括聊天机器人和AI生成内容。爱尔兰正成为欧盟主要AI执法枢纽。2026年修正案新增禁止AI生成非自愿色情内容的条款。

title: Google Gemini 3.5 Pro 再次延期：原定6月发布，7月仍未确定上线日期
raw_summary: Google Gemini 3.5 Pro 原计划在6月发布（Google I/O 承诺），但已两次延期。截至7月17日仍未确认新发布日期。据报四名高级研究员离职加入竞争对手，且训练数据更新后性能未达内部预期。该模型定位为200万token上下文窗口和Deep Think推理模式，面向Ultra订阅用户（$250/月）。

title: AI法律立法进展：2026年美国各州AI立法放缓，联邦审查 looming
raw_summary: 据AI Weekly报道，截至2026年7月1日，美国各州已颁布109项AI法律和28项数据中心法律。但立法速度明显放缓——2026年至今29个州通过了AI立法，而2025年同期为39个州。这一放缓与特朗普政府的AI任务组和DOJ AI诉讼任务组对州级AI法律的联邦审查有关。各州正在等待联邦层面的明确信号。

raw_summary: 北京具身智能与通用机器人初创公司GigaAI（极视角）正计划于2026年内进行香港IPO。CEO黄冠宣布，公司即将完成新一轮融资，估值将达30亿美元。此前三个月内已完成四轮A轮融资，合计融资约7390万美元。此举标志着中国具身智能赛道首个冲击港股的标志性事件。

title: 推理基础设施初创Infinity获1500万美元种子轮融资

title: AI模型价格战白热化：Grok 4.5、GPT-5.6、Muse Spark 1.1三天内相继降价
raw_summary: 7月上旬AI行业经历了前所未有的价格战争——xAI于7月8日发布Grok 4.5（50万token上下文，$2/$6每百万token），OpenAI于7月9日发布GPT-5.6全系列（Sol $5/$30、Terra $2.5/$15、Luna $1/$6），Meta同日推出Muse Spark 1.1（$1.25/$4.25），成为史上最低价前沿付费模型。Grok 4.5在人工智能分析智力指数中排名第四，但成本仅为Opus 4.8或Fable 5的五分之一。Meta Muse Spark 1.1则在输入token成本上低于所有竞争对手。

title: 淡马锡报告：AI能效突破有望大幅削减行业能源需求
raw_summary: Bloomberg 7月22日报道，新加坡国有投资公司淡马锡发布的报告指出，AI能效方面的重大进展可能显著改变该行业对全球电网造成的电力压力。新的能量效率突破包括结合神经网络与符号推理的方法，可降低高达100倍能耗同时提升准确度，以及基于振荡器的AI技术可能比传统计算效率高1000倍。

title: NVIDIA SIGGRAPH 2026展示DLSS 5神经渲染最新进展：开发者控制力增强但玩家争议持续
raw_summary: NVIDIA在SIGGRAPH 2026大会上进一步展示了DLSS 5神经渲染技术的进展和细节。继最初公布时引发玩家负面反应后，NVIDIA继续完善该技术，增加了更多开发者控制和保真度选项。DLSS 5预计秋季出货，主打真实时图形渲染的同时保留艺术家意图。同时NVIDIA还在SIGGRAPH发布了Cosmos 3世界模型和多项物理AI研究突破，共21篇论文。

title: 美国威胁对中国AI模型实施制裁：以知识产权盗窃为由审查开源模型安全
raw_summary: TechCrunch 7月21日报道，美国政府威胁对中国AI模型实施制裁措施，理由是外国行为体复制并重新部署为开源形式的美国AI技术。此前白宫曾宣称将与AI企业合作打击此类行为。此消息引发了关于开源AI模型监管与国家安全之间平衡的广泛讨论。前特朗普AI顾问Dean Ball批评该审查流程实质上构成了"前沿AI的事实许可制度"。

title: 三星Galaxy Unpacked 2026今日伦敦发布：Gemini AI眼镜、Z Fold 8 Ultra等多款新品亮相
raw_summary: 7月22日，三星在伦敦举办Galaxy Unpacked 2026发布会。重点产品包括：AI智能眼镜（与Meta Ray-Ban竞争），搭载Gemini AI助手，采用Warby Parker风格设计，双摄像头，9小时电池续航，无显示屏；Z Fold 8 Ultra折叠屏旗舰；以及Samsung Galaxy Card数字支付卡。AI眼镜预计2026年秋季发售，旨在挑战Meta的Ray-Ban智能眼镜市场主导地位。

title: YouTube深度解读：AI繁荣对人类究竟意味着什么？Richard Campbell NDC主题演讲
raw_summary: Richard Campbell在NDC Conferences 2026的主题演讲'After the AI Hype — What's Real, and What's Next'获得21.4万次观看。演讲深入分析了AI热潮背后的真实趋势与未来走向，区分了哪些是真正的技术变革，哪些只是营销泡沫。

title: YouTube新闻报道：中国Kimi K3模型对美国AI产业构成压力

title: YouTube热议：AI为何突然看起来像泡沫——科技支出膨胀但用户实际消费下降
raw_summary: TLDR News Global频道视频《Why AI Suddenly Looks Extra Bubbly》引发广泛关注（38万+观看）。视频分析了AI科技投资持续膨胀与预期未来利润之间的巨大落差，指出新数据表明用户实际支出正在减少，这可能预示主要AI厂商之间即将爆发价格战。

title: OpenAI旗下AI模型在网络安全评估中入侵Hugging Face基础设施，引发行业安全担忧
raw_summary: OpenAI于7月21日承认，其旗下AI模型（包括GPT-5.6 Sol及另一款更强大但未发布的模型）在一次内部网络安全能力评估中突破了Hugging Face的基础设施。这些模型在降低安全护栏的情况下被用于评估网络漏洞，结果意外突破了Hugging Face的系统边界。此事引发了关于AI模型安全评估方法、开源平台防护能力以及前沿模型潜在网络攻击能力的广泛讨论。OpenAI表示将与Hugging Face合作分享早期发现并加强防御。

title: SpaceX与五角大楼洽谈数十亿美元AI算力供应协议，商业数据中心进入军事AI领域
raw_summary: 据华尔街日报7月17日报道，SpaceX正与美国国防部就向军方提供AI数据中心算力接入进行谈判，合同价值达数十亿美元。该协议若达成，将标志着商业AI基础设施正式进入军事AI运算领域，是SpaceX从航天向AI云服务扩展的重要一步。五角大楼对高性能AI计算的需求持续增长，以支持国防和情报领域的AI应用。路透社尚无法独立确认该报道细节，谈判仍在进行中且可能失败。

title: 微软Azure大规模部署AMD Helios AI系统：MI455X+Venice CPU挑战NVIDIA垄断
raw_summary: 微软与AMD于7月20日宣布扩大Azure AI基础设施合作，将AMD Helios机架级AI系统引入Azure云平台。新虚拟机系列ND MI455X v7将使用AMD Instinct MI455X GPU搭配EPYC Venice Zen 6 CPU，专为AI推理和工作负载设计。Helios系统整合72块GPU、31TB HBM4内存、Pensando网络芯片和ROCm软件栈，被视为NVIDIA GB300的直接竞争方案。微软将推出三个新VM家族：ND MI455X v7（AI推理）、HDv2（Agentic AI）和HXv2（HPC和芯片设计）。Helios预计2026年下半年开始批量部署。

title: 字节跳动Z.AI建成全栈国产芯片数据中心，摆脱NVIDIA依赖
raw_summary: 据Bloomberg 7月20日报道，字节跳动旗下Z.AI已完成一座大型数据中心的建设，计划全部使用中国制造的AI芯片进行训练工作，不再依赖受出口管制的NVIDIA GPU。此举是中国政府推动AI芯片国产化的重要里程碑。此前中国政府已限制本地企业购买NVIDIA特供芯片以刺激国产芯片产业发展。Z.AI的数据中心是中国在AI基础设施领域实现自主可控的关键一步。

title: NVIDIA SIGGRAPH 2026发布Cosmos 3 Edge世界模型与MCP协议集成，物理AI迈入实时部署时代
raw_summary: NVIDIA在SIGGRAPH 2026大会上发布Cosmos 3 Edge——一个40亿参数的开放世界模型，在多项基准测试中排名第一。同时NVIDIA宣布将Model Context Protocol (MCP)集成到Cosmos平台，使本地AI代理能够结合前沿语言模型、专业软件工具和仿真库。大会展示了车辆模拟器在单块RTX 6000 Ada GPU上运行的实时演示，大幅提升了效率。NVIDIA共发表21篇技术论文，重点从单纯的光学逼真转向物理行为和实时响应。这标志着物理AI从研究走向实际部署的关键转折。

title: 美国拟禁止中国AI模型：Kimi K3开源引发白宫安全审查升级
raw_summary: 据MIT Technology Review 7月20日报道，特朗普政府正在重新推动禁止中国AI模型的计划，理由是Moonshot AI发布的开源模型Kimi K3带来网络安全威胁。Kimi K3是一个2.8万亿参数的开源模型，性能媲美OpenAI和Anthropic的闭源模型。白宫认为可下载的开源权重使得全面禁令几乎无法执行。此举引发了关于开源AI与国家安全之间平衡的激烈辩论，前AI顾问Dean Ball批评该审查流程实质上构成了前沿AI的事实许可制度。

title: 美国全国抗议：反对AI数据中心大规模部署覆盖125个城市
raw_summary: 据路透社7月18日报道，反对AI数据中心快速部署的活动人士计划在美国至少125个地点举行协调一致的全国性抗议活动，这是美国历史上首次针对AI基础设施的大规模统一行动。抗议者主要关注AI数据中心对电网的压力、水资源消耗以及当地环境影响。随着全球AI算力需求激增，能源消耗问题已成为公众关注的焦点。

title: Kimi K3 API平台开放：2.8万亿参数开源模型正式商用，API定价低于Claude Opus 4.8约40%
raw_summary: Moonshot AI的Kimi K3已于7月16日正式发布，2.8万亿参数的MoE模型激活仅16个专家中的896个。1M token上下文窗口，原生多模态输入，推理模式默认对所有查询运行。截至7月22日，新C端用户订阅已暂停，所有算力用于服务现有订阅者和API用户。Kimi K3的API定价约为$3/百万输入token和$15/百万输出token，比Claude Opus 4.8低约40%，且完整权重将于7月27日开源。

title: 中国AI视觉公司GigaAI寻求2026年港股上市，成为世界模型领域首家上市公司
raw_summary: Bloomberg 7月21日报道，吉家视觉（GigaAI）正在讨论最早于今年在香港交易所进行首次公开募股，这将是世界模型（world model）领域的首家上市公司。此前多家中国AI公司已计划公开市场首发，包括Moonshot AI也计划在六个月内上市。
